model.capstone_monthly.stg_dim_chokepoin.name: stg_dim_chokepoint
model.capstone_monthly.stg_dim_chokepoin.description: Routing-backed chokepoint staging model carrying chokepoint points, circular zones of influence, and BigQuery geography conversions.

chokepoint_id.name: chokepoint_id
chokepoint_id.description: Stable hashed chokepoint identifier derived from the chokepoint name.

chokepoint_kind.name: chokepoint_kind
chokepoint_kind.description: Routing classification for the chokepoint, such as canal, strait, or cape.

zone_of_influence_radius_m.name: zone_of_influence_radius_m
zone_of_influence_radius_m.description: Radius in meters used to build the chokepoint zone-of-influence polygon.

chokepoint_point_wkb.name: chokepoint_point_wkb
chokepoint_point_wkb.description: WKB-encoded point geometry for the chokepoint centroid.

zone_of_influence_wkb.name: zone_of_influence_wkb
zone_of_influence_wkb.description: WKB-encoded polygon representing the chokepoint zone of influence.

chokepoint_point_geog.name: chokepoint_point_geog
chokepoint_point_geog.description: BigQuery geography created from the chokepoint point WKB when the target is BigQuery.

zone_of_influence_geog.name: zone_of_influence_geog
zone_of_influence_geog.description: BigQuery geography created from the chokepoint zone-of-influence WKB when the target is BigQuery.

geo_point.name: geo_point
geo_point.description: BigQuery point geography created from longitude and latitude for GIS usage while preserving the numeric coordinates.

model.capstone_monthly.stg_dim_chokepoin.raw_code:
select
  {{ canonical_chokepoint_id('chokepoint_name') }} as chokepoint_id,
  {{ canonicalize_chokepoint_name('chokepoint_name') }} as chokepoint_name,
  {{ cast_string('kind') }} as chokepoint_kind,
  {{ cast_float('longitude') }} as longitude,
  {{ cast_float('latitude') }} as latitude,
  {{ cast_int('zone_of_influence_radius_m') }} as zone_of_influence_radius_m,
  chokepoint_point_wkb,
  zone_of_influence_wkb,
  {{ geography_from_wkb('chokepoint_point_wkb') }} as chokepoint_point_geog,
  {{ geography_from_wkb('zone_of_influence_wkb') }} as zone_of_influence_geog,
  case
    when {{ cast_float('longitude') }} is not null and {{ cast_float('latitude') }} is not null
      then {{ geography_point(cast_float('longitude'), cast_float('latitude')) }}
    else null
  end as geo_point
from {{ source('raw', 'dim_chokepoint') }}

  end as chokepoint_name,

model.capstone_monthly.stg_dim_time.name: stg_dim_time
model.capstone_monthly.stg_dim_time.description: Canonical monthly time dimension generated in dbt from the observed month coverage of trade, PortWatch, Brent, FX, energy, and event sources, with configurable lead and lag month buffers.

period.name: period
period.description: Integer month key in YYYYMM format.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.description: Canonical month label in YYYY-MM format.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First calendar day of the month generated for the conformed monthly calendar.

model.capstone_monthly.stg_dim_time.compiled_code:
with observed_months as (

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`comtrade_fact`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`portwatch_monthly`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    cast(month_start_date as date) as month_start_date
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`brent_monthly`
  where month_start_date is not null

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`ecb_fx_eu_monthly`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`bridge_event_month_chokepoint_core`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`bridge_event_month_maritime_region`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year as string), '-01-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`energy_vulnerability`
  where year is not null

),

bounds as (

  select
    min(month_start_date) as min_month_start,
    max(month_start_date) as max_month_start
  from observed_months

),

calendar as (

  select
    month_start_date
  from bounds,
  
    unnest(generate_date_array(cast(
    date_add(cast(min_month_start as date), interval -12 month)
   as date), cast(
    date_add(cast(max_month_start as date), interval 12 month)
   as date), interval 1 month)) as month_start_date
  

)

select
  
    cast(format_date('%Y%m', cast(month_start_date as date)) as INT64)
   as period,
  cast(extract(year from cast(month_start_date as date)) as INT64) as year,
  cast(extract(month from cast(month_start_date as date)) as INT64) as month,
  cast(extract(quarter from cast(month_start_date as date)) as INT64) as quarter,
  
    format_date('%Y-%m', cast(month_start_date as date))
   as year_month,
  month_start_date
from calendar

model.capstone_monthly.stg_portwatch_dai.name: stg_portwatch_daily
model.capstone_monthly.stg_portwatch_dai.description: Canonical PortWatch daily staging model at date-day and chokepoint grain. Uses a scaffolded daily calendar to retain missing and stale source coverage while standardizing daily traffic and throughput signals.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.description: Calendar day used by Looker Studio daily filters and trend charts.

portwatch_source_chokepoint_id.name: portwatch_source_chokepoint_id
portwatch_source_chokepoint_id.description: Source PortWatch chokepoint identifier retained for lineage to the raw landing table.

chokepoint_id.name: chokepoint_id
chokepoint_id.description: Stable canonical chokepoint identifier hashed from the standardized chokepoint name.

chokepoint_name.name: chokepoint_name
chokepoint_name.description: Human-readable chokepoint name standardized for downstream semantic marts.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.description: Canonical month key in YYYY-MM format retained for daily-to-month filtering and grouping.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First calendar day of the row's month, retained for Looker Studio month filters.

n_total.name: n_total
n_total.description: Daily vessel count proxy sourced from PortWatch.

capacity.name: capacity
capacity.description: Daily throughput proxy sourced from PortWatch.

vessel_size_index.name: vessel_size_index
vessel_size_index.description: Capacity divided by total vessel count when both are available.

tanker_share.name: tanker_share
tanker_share.description: Share of tracked daily vessel counts represented by tankers.

container_share.name: container_share
container_share.description: Share of tracked daily vessel counts represented by container vessels.

dry_bulk_share.name: dry_bulk_share
dry_bulk_share.description: Share of tracked daily vessel counts represented by dry bulk vessels.

priority_vessel_share.name: priority_vessel_share
priority_vessel_share.description: Chokepoint-specific priority vessel share aligned to the project's monthly stress logic.

has_portwatch_daily_data_flag.name: has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
has_portwatch_daily_data_flag.description: True when the raw PortWatch landing table contains an observed row for the day and chokepoint.

model.capstone_monthly.stg_portwatch_dai.raw_code:
-- Grain: one row per date_day + chokepoint_id.
-- Builds a scaffolded PortWatch daily calendar so missing or stale chokepoint
-- coverage remains visible to downstream daily marts.

with raw_portwatch as (
  select
    cast(date_day as date) as date_day,
    {{ cast_string('chokepoint_id') }} as portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    {{ canonical_chokepoint_id('chokepoint_name') }} as chokepoint_id,
    {{ canonicalize_chokepoint_name('chokepoint_name') }} as chokepoint_name,
    {{ cast_float('n_total') }} as n_total,
    {{ cast_float('capacity') }} as capacity,
    {{ cast_float('n_tanker') }} as n_tanker,
    {{ cast_float('n_container') }} as n_container,
    {{ cast_float('n_dry_bulk') }} as n_dry_bulk,
    {{ cast_float('capacity_tanker') }} as capacity_tanker,
    {{ cast_float('capacity_container') }} as capacity_container,
    {{ cast_float('capacity_dry_bulk') }} as capacity_dry_bulk
  from {{ source('raw', 'portwatch_daily') }}
  where date_day is not null
    and chokepoint_id is not null
    and {{ clean_label_text('chokepoint_name') }} is not null
),
observed_daily as (
  select
    date_day,
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_id,
    max(chokepoint_name) as chokepoint_name,
    max(n_total) as n_total,
    max(capacity) as capacity,
    max(n_tanker) as n_tanker,
    max(n_container) as n_container,
    max(n_dry_bulk) as n_dry_bulk,
    max(capacity_tanker) as capacity_tanker,
    max(capacity_container) as capacity_container,
    max(capacity_dry_bulk) as capacity_dry_bulk
  from raw_portwatch
  group by 1, 2, 3
),
chokepoints as (
  select distinct
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name
  from observed_daily
),
bounds as (
  select
    min(date_day) as min_date_day,
    max(date_day) as max_date_day
  from observed_daily
),
calendar as (
  select date_day
  from bounds,
  {{ date_series('bounds.min_date_day', 'bounds.max_date_day', 'date_day') }}
),
scaffolded as (
  select
    c.date_day,
    cp.portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    cp.chokepoint_id,
    cp.chokepoint_name,
    od.n_total,
    od.capacity,
    od.n_tanker,
    od.n_container,
    od.n_dry_bulk,
    od.capacity_tanker,
    od.capacity_container,
    od.capacity_dry_bulk,
    case when od.date_day is null then 0 else 1 end as has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
  from calendar as c
  cross join chokepoints as cp
  left join observed_daily as od
    on c.date_day = od.date_day
   and cp.chokepoint_id = od.chokepoint_id
),
dated as (
  select
    date_day,
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    {{ year_month_from_date('date_day') }} as year_month,
    {{ year_int_from_date('date_day') }} as year,
    {{ month_int_from_date('date_day') }} as month,
    cast(extract(day from date_day) as {{ dbt.type_int() }}) as day,
    n_total,
    capacity,
    n_tanker,
    n_container,
    n_dry_bulk,
    capacity_tanker,
    capacity_container,
    capacity_dry_bulk,
    has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
  from scaffolded
),
signals as (
  select
    date_day,
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    year_month,
    {{ month_start_from_year_month('year_month') }} as month_start_date,
    year,
    month,
    day,
    n_total,
    capacity,
    n_tanker,
    n_container,
    n_dry_bulk,
    capacity_tanker,
    capacity_container,
    capacity_dry_bulk,
    case
      when n_total is null or n_total = 0 then null
      else capacity / n_total
    end as vessel_size_index,
    case
      when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
      else {{ safe_divide('n_tanker', 'coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0)') }}
    end as tanker_share,
    case
      when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
      else {{ safe_divide('n_container', 'coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0)') }}
    end as container_share,
    case
      when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
      else {{ safe_divide('n_dry_bulk', 'coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0)') }}
    end as dry_bulk_share,
    has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
  from dated
)

select
  date_day,
  portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
  chokepoint_id,
  chokepoint_name,
  year_month,
  month_start_date,
  year,
  month,
  day,
  n_total,
  capacity,
  n_tanker,
  n_container,
  n_dry_bulk,
  capacity_tanker,
  capacity_container,
  capacity_dry_bulk,
  vessel_size_index,
  tanker_share,
  container_share,
  dry_bulk_share,
  case
    when chokepoint_name = 'Strait of Hormuz' then tanker_share
    when chokepoint_name in ('Suez Canal', 'Panama Canal') then container_share
    else dry_bulk_share
  end as priority_vessel_share,
  has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
from signals
model.capstone_monthly.stg_portwatch_dai.compiled_code:
-- Grain: one row per date_day + chokepoint_id.
-- Builds a scaffolded PortWatch daily calendar so missing or stale chokepoint
-- coverage remains visible to downstream daily marts.

with raw_portwatch as (
  select
    cast(date_day as date) as date_day,
    cast(chokepoint_id as string) as portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    
    to_hex(md5(cast(lower(case
    when 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is null then null
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('hormuz', 'hormuz strait', 'strait of hormuz') then 'Strait of Hormuz'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in (
      'bab el-mandeb',
      'bab el-mandeb strait',
      'bab el mandeb',
      'bab el mandeb strait',
      'bab-el-mandeb',
      'bab-el-mandeb strait'
    ) then 'Bab el-Mandeb'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('panama', 'panama canal') then 'Panama Canal'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('malacca', 'malacca strait', 'strait of malacca') then 'Malacca Strait'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('gibraltar', 'gibraltar strait', 'strait of gibraltar') then 'Gibraltar Strait'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'suez' then 'Suez Canal'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'suez canal' then 'Suez Canal'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'cape of good hope' then 'Cape of Good Hope'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'turkish straits' then 'Turkish Straits'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'open sea' then 'Open Sea'
    else 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  
  end) as string)))
   as chokepoint_id,
    case
    when 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is null then null
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('hormuz', 'hormuz strait', 'strait of hormuz') then 'Strait of Hormuz'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in (
      'bab el-mandeb',
      'bab el-mandeb strait',
      'bab el mandeb',
      'bab el mandeb strait',
      'bab-el-mandeb',
      'bab-el-mandeb strait'
    ) then 'Bab el-Mandeb'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('panama', 'panama canal') then 'Panama Canal'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('malacca', 'malacca strait', 'strait of malacca') then 'Malacca Strait'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('gibraltar', 'gibraltar strait', 'strait of gibraltar') then 'Gibraltar Strait'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'suez' then 'Suez Canal'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'suez canal' then 'Suez Canal'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'cape of good hope' then 'Cape of Good Hope'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'turkish straits' then 'Turkish Straits'
    when lower(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'open sea' then 'Open Sea'
    else 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  
  end as chokepoint_name,
    cast(n_total as FLOAT64) as n_total,
    cast(capacity as FLOAT64) as capacity,
    cast(n_tanker as FLOAT64) as n_tanker,
    cast(n_container as FLOAT64) as n_container,
    cast(n_dry_bulk as FLOAT64) as n_dry_bulk,
    cast(capacity_tanker as FLOAT64) as capacity_tanker,
    cast(capacity_container as FLOAT64) as capacity_container,
    cast(capacity_dry_bulk as FLOAT64) as capacity_dry_bulk
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`portwatch_daily`
  where date_day is not null
    and chokepoint_id is not null
    and 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(chokepoint_name as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is not null
),
observed_daily as (
  select
    date_day,
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_id,
    max(chokepoint_name) as chokepoint_name,
    max(n_total) as n_total,
    max(capacity) as capacity,
    max(n_tanker) as n_tanker,
    max(n_container) as n_container,
    max(n_dry_bulk) as n_dry_bulk,
    max(capacity_tanker) as capacity_tanker,
    max(capacity_container) as capacity_container,
    max(capacity_dry_bulk) as capacity_dry_bulk
  from raw_portwatch
  group by 1, 2, 3
),
chokepoints as (
  select distinct
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name
  from observed_daily
),
bounds as (
  select
    min(date_day) as min_date_day,
    max(date_day) as max_date_day
  from observed_daily
),
calendar as (
  select date_day
  from bounds,
  
    unnest(generate_date_array(cast(bounds.min_date_day as date), cast(bounds.max_date_day as date), interval 1 day)) as date_day
  
),
scaffolded as (
  select
    c.date_day,
    cp.portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    cp.chokepoint_id,
    cp.chokepoint_name,
    od.n_total,
    od.capacity,
    od.n_tanker,
    od.n_container,
    od.n_dry_bulk,
    od.capacity_tanker,
    od.capacity_container,
    od.capacity_dry_bulk,
    case when od.date_day is null then 0 else 1 end as has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
  from calendar as c
  cross join chokepoints as cp
  left join observed_daily as od
    on c.date_day = od.date_day
   and cp.chokepoint_id = od.chokepoint_id
),
dated as (
  select
    date_day,
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    
    format_date('%Y-%m', cast(date_day as date))
   as year_month,
    cast(extract(year from cast(date_day as date)) as INT64) as year,
    cast(extract(month from cast(date_day as date)) as INT64) as month,
    cast(extract(day from date_day) as INT64) as day,
    n_total,
    capacity,
    n_tanker,
    n_container,
    n_dry_bulk,
    capacity_tanker,
    capacity_container,
    capacity_dry_bulk,
    has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
  from scaffolded
),
signals as (
  select
    date_day,
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    year_month,
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date,
    year,
    month,
    day,
    n_total,
    capacity,
    n_tanker,
    n_container,
    n_dry_bulk,
    capacity_tanker,
    capacity_container,
    capacity_dry_bulk,
    case
      when n_total is null or n_total = 0 then null
      else capacity / n_total
    end as vessel_size_index,
    case
      when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
      else case
    when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) is null or coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
    else (n_tanker) / (coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0))
  end
    end as tanker_share,
    case
      when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
      else case
    when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) is null or coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
    else (n_container) / (coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0))
  end
    end as container_share,
    case
      when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
      else case
    when coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) is null or coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0) = 0 then null
    else (n_dry_bulk) / (coalesce(n_tanker, 0) + coalesce(n_container, 0) + coalesce(n_dry_bulk, 0))
  end
    end as dry_bulk_share,
    has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
  from dated
)

select
  date_day,
  portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
  chokepoint_id,
  chokepoint_name,
  year_month,
  month_start_date,
  year,
  month,
  day,
  n_total,
  capacity,
  n_tanker,
  n_container,
  n_dry_bulk,
  capacity_tanker,
  capacity_container,
  capacity_dry_bulk,
  vessel_size_index,
  tanker_share,
  container_share,
  dry_bulk_share,
  case
    when chokepoint_name = 'Strait of Hormuz' then tanker_share
    when chokepoint_name in ('Suez Canal', 'Panama Canal') then container_share
    else dry_bulk_share
  end as priority_vessel_share,
  has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
from signals

model.capstone_monthly.stg_fx_monthly.name: stg_fx_monthly
model.capstone_monthly.stg_fx_monthly.description: Standardized monthly FX context sourced from the canonical silver-backed raw FX monthly landing table, exposing both USD-base direct rates and EUR-base derived crosses.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.description: Canonical month key in YYYY-MM format.

currency_view.name: currency_view
currency_view.description: Analytical FX view label such as USD_base or EUR_base.

base_currency_code.name: base_currency_code
base_currency_code.description: Base currency for the presented FX rate view.

fx_currency_code.name: fx_currency_code
fx_currency_code.description: Currency code for the quoted monthly FX series standardized to uppercase.

fx_rate.name: fx_rate
fx_rate.description: Average monthly FX rate expressed as quote currency units per one base currency unit for the selected currency_view.

fx_rate_to_usd.name: fx_rate_to_usd
fx_rate_to_usd.description: USD per quoted currency unit, retained as a normalized comparison metric across currency views.

fx_mom_change.name: fx_mom_change
fx_mom_change.description: Month-over-month percentage change in the presented view-specific monthly FX rate.

model.capstone_monthly.stg_fx_monthly.raw_code:
-- Grain: one row per year_month + currency_view + fx_currency_code.
-- Builds EUR-base canonical rates from the ECB-native monthly pair table plus USD-base derived crosses via EUR/USD.

with raw_fx as (
  select
    year_month,
    cast(month_start_date as date) as month_start_date,
    {{ cast_int('year') }} as year,
    {{ cast_int('month') }} as month,
    upper(trim(base_currency_code)) as base_currency_code,
    upper(trim(quote_currency_code)) as quote_currency_code,
    {{ cast_float('fx_rate') }} as fx_rate
  from {{ source('raw', 'ecb_fx_eu_monthly') }}
  where year_month is not null
    and {{ regex_full_match('year_month', '^\\d{4}-\\d{2}$') }}
    and base_currency_code is not null
    and quote_currency_code is not null
    and fx_rate is not null
),
eur_usd_bridge as (
  select
    year_month,
    month_start_date,
    year,
    month,
    fx_rate as eur_usd_rate
  from raw_fx
  where base_currency_code = 'EUR'
    and quote_currency_code = 'USD'
),
eur_base_direct as (
  select
    raw.year_month,
    raw.month_start_date,
    raw.year,
    raw.month,
    'EUR_base' as currency_view,
    'EUR' as base_currency_code,
    raw.quote_currency_code as fx_currency_code,
    raw.fx_rate,
    case
      when raw.quote_currency_code = 'USD' then 1.0
      else {{ safe_divide('bridge.eur_usd_rate', 'raw.fx_rate') }}
    end as fx_rate_to_usd
  from raw_fx as raw
  inner join eur_usd_bridge as bridge
    on raw.year_month = bridge.year_month
  where raw.base_currency_code = 'EUR'
    and raw.quote_currency_code <> 'EUR'
),
usd_eur_bridge as (
  select
    bridge.year_month,
    bridge.month_start_date,
    bridge.year,
    bridge.month,
    'USD_base' as currency_view,
    'USD' as base_currency_code,
    'EUR' as fx_currency_code,
    {{ fx_inverse_rate('bridge.eur_usd_rate') }} as fx_rate,
    bridge.eur_usd_rate as fx_rate_to_usd
  from eur_usd_bridge as bridge
),
usd_base_derived as (
  select
    eur.year_month,
    eur.month_start_date,
    eur.year,
    eur.month,
    'USD_base' as currency_view,
    'USD' as base_currency_code,
    eur.fx_currency_code,
    {{ safe_divide('eur.fx_rate', 'bridge.eur_usd_rate') }} as fx_rate,
    eur.fx_rate_to_usd
  from eur_base_direct as eur
  inner join eur_usd_bridge as bridge
    on eur.year_month = bridge.year_month
  where eur.fx_currency_code <> 'USD'
),
combined as (
  select * from eur_base_direct
  union all
  select * from usd_eur_bridge
  union all
  select * from usd_base_derived
),
with_momentum as (
  select
    year_month,
    month_start_date,
    year,
    month,
    currency_view,
    base_currency_code,
    fx_currency_code,
    fx_rate,
    fx_rate_to_usd,
    lag(fx_rate) over (
      partition by currency_view, base_currency_code, fx_currency_code
      order by year_month
    ) as prev_fx_rate
  from combined
)

select
  year_month,
  month_start_date,
  year,
  month,
  currency_view,
  base_currency_code,
  fx_currency_code,
  fx_rate,
  fx_rate_to_usd,
  case
    when prev_fx_rate is null or prev_fx_rate = 0 then null
    else (fx_rate - prev_fx_rate) / prev_fx_rate
  end as fx_mom_change
from with_momentum
model.capstone_monthly.stg_fx_monthly.compiled_code:
-- Grain: one row per year_month + currency_view + fx_currency_code.
-- Builds EUR-base canonical rates from the ECB-native monthly pair table plus USD-base derived crosses via EUR/USD.

with raw_fx as (
  select
    year_month,
    cast(month_start_date as date) as month_start_date,
    cast(year as INT64) as year,
    cast(month as INT64) as month,
    upper(trim(base_currency_code)) as base_currency_code,
    upper(trim(quote_currency_code)) as quote_currency_code,
    cast(fx_rate as FLOAT64) as fx_rate
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`raw`.`ecb_fx_eu_monthly`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  
    and base_currency_code is not null
    and quote_currency_code is not null
    and fx_rate is not null
),
eur_usd_bridge as (
  select
    year_month,
    month_start_date,
    year,
    month,
    fx_rate as eur_usd_rate
  from raw_fx
  where base_currency_code = 'EUR'
    and quote_currency_code = 'USD'
),
eur_base_direct as (
  select
    raw.year_month,
    raw.month_start_date,
    raw.year,
    raw.month,
    'EUR_base' as currency_view,
    'EUR' as base_currency_code,
    raw.quote_currency_code as fx_currency_code,
    raw.fx_rate,
    case
      when raw.quote_currency_code = 'USD' then 1.0
      else case
    when raw.fx_rate is null or raw.fx_rate = 0 then null
    else (bridge.eur_usd_rate) / (raw.fx_rate)
  end
    end as fx_rate_to_usd
  from raw_fx as raw
  inner join eur_usd_bridge as bridge
    on raw.year_month = bridge.year_month
  where raw.base_currency_code = 'EUR'
    and raw.quote_currency_code <> 'EUR'
),
usd_eur_bridge as (
  select
    bridge.year_month,
    bridge.month_start_date,
    bridge.year,
    bridge.month,
    'USD_base' as currency_view,
    'USD' as base_currency_code,
    'EUR' as fx_currency_code,
    case
    when bridge.eur_usd_rate is null or bridge.eur_usd_rate = 0 then null
    else (1.0) / (bridge.eur_usd_rate)
  end as fx_rate,
    bridge.eur_usd_rate as fx_rate_to_usd
  from eur_usd_bridge as bridge
),
usd_base_derived as (
  select
    eur.year_month,
    eur.month_start_date,
    eur.year,
    eur.month,
    'USD_base' as currency_view,
    'USD' as base_currency_code,
    eur.fx_currency_code,
    case
    when bridge.eur_usd_rate is null or bridge.eur_usd_rate = 0 then null
    else (eur.fx_rate) / (bridge.eur_usd_rate)
  end as fx_rate,
    eur.fx_rate_to_usd
  from eur_base_direct as eur
  inner join eur_usd_bridge as bridge
    on eur.year_month = bridge.year_month
  where eur.fx_currency_code <> 'USD'
),
combined as (
  select * from eur_base_direct
  union all
  select * from usd_eur_bridge
  union all
  select * from usd_base_derived
),
with_momentum as (
  select
    year_month,
    month_start_date,
    year,
    month,
    currency_view,
    base_currency_code,
    fx_currency_code,
    fx_rate,
    fx_rate_to_usd,
    lag(fx_rate) over (
      partition by currency_view, base_currency_code, fx_currency_code
      order by year_month
    ) as prev_fx_rate
  from combined
)

select
  year_month,
  month_start_date,
  year,
  month,
  currency_view,
  base_currency_code,
  fx_currency_code,
  fx_rate,
  fx_rate_to_usd,
  case
    when prev_fx_rate is null or prev_fx_rate = 0 then null
    else (fx_rate - prev_fx_rate) / prev_fx_rate
  end as fx_mom_change
from with_momentum

model.capstone_monthly.stg_energy_vulner.raw_code:
-- Grain: one row per reporter_iso3 + year + indicator_code.
-- Purpose: standardized long-format country-level energy vulnerability indicators.

{{ config(materialized='table') }}

with raw_source as (
  select
    cast(dt as date) as dt,
    {{ safe_cast('year', dbt.type_int()) }} as year,
    trim({{ cast_string('dataset') }}) as dataset,
    trim({{ cast_string('source') }}) as source_name,
    {{ cast_string('ingest_ts') }} as ingest_ts,
    lower(trim({{ cast_string('indicator_alias') }})) as indicator_alias,
    trim({{ cast_string('indicator_id') }}) as indicator_id,
    trim({{ cast_string('indicator_name') }}) as indicator_name,
    lower(trim({{ cast_string('metric_name') }})) as metric_name,
    trim({{ cast_string('unit_hint') }}) as unit_hint,
    trim({{ cast_string('country_name') }}) as country_name,
    trim({{ cast_string('country_id') }}) as country_id,
    upper(trim({{ cast_string('country_iso3') }})) as country_iso3,
    {{ safe_cast('value', dbt.type_float()) }} as indicator_value,
    trim({{ cast_string('wb_unit') }}) as wb_unit,
    trim({{ cast_string('obs_status') }}) as obs_status,
    {{ safe_cast('decimal_places', dbt.type_int()) }} as decimal_places
  from {{ source('raw', 'energy_vulnerability') }}
),
standardized as (
  select
    dt,
    coalesce(year, {{ year_int_from_date('dt') }}) as year,
    dataset,
    source_name,
    ingest_ts,
    indicator_alias,
    indicator_id,
    indicator_name,
    coalesce(nullif(metric_name, ''), nullif(indicator_alias, ''), 'unknown_indicator') as indicator_code,
    coalesce(nullif(wb_unit, ''), nullif(unit_hint, '')) as unit,
    country_name as reporter_country_name,
    lower(trim(country_name)) as reporter_country_name_norm,
    country_id,
    country_iso3 as reporter_iso3,
    indicator_value,
    obs_status,
    decimal_places
  from raw_source
),
deduplicated as (
  select
    *,
    row_number() over (
      partition by reporter_iso3, reporter_country_name_norm, year, indicator_code
      order by ingest_ts desc
    ) as _rn
  from standardized
  where year is not null
    and indicator_code is not null
),
final as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    reporter_country_name,
    reporter_country_name_norm,
    country_id,
    year,
    cast((year * 100) + 1 as integer) as period,
    concat({{ cast_string('year') }}, '-01') as year_month,
    indicator_code,
    indicator_alias,
    indicator_id,
    indicator_name,
    indicator_value,
    unit,
    source_name,
    dataset,
    dt,
    ingest_ts,
    obs_status,
    decimal_places,
    coalesce(reporter_iso3, '') || '|' || {{ cast_string('year') }} || '|' || indicator_code as grain_key
  from deduplicated
  where _rn = 1
)

select
  reporter_iso3,
  reporter_country_name,
  reporter_country_name_norm,
  country_id,
  year,
  period,
  year_month,
  indicator_code,
  indicator_alias,
  indicator_id,
  indicator_name,
  indicator_value,
  unit,
  source_name,
  dataset,
  dt,
  ingest_ts,
  obs_status,
  decimal_places,
  grain_key
from final
where reporter_iso3 is not null
  and indicator_code is not null
model.capstone_monthly.stg_energy_vulner.compiled_code:
-- Grain: one row per reporter_iso3 + year + indicator_code.
-- Purpose: standardized long-format country-level energy vulnerability indicators.



with raw_source as (
  select
    cast(dt as date) as dt,
    
    safe_cast(year as INT64)
   as year,
    trim(cast(dataset as string)) as dataset,
    trim(cast(source as string)) as source_name,
    cast(ingest_ts as string) as ingest_ts,
    lower(trim(cast(indicator_alias as string))) as indicator_alias,
    trim(cast(indicator_id as string)) as indicator_id,
    trim(cast(indicator_name as string)) as indicator_name,
    lower(trim(cast(metric_name as string))) as metric_name,
    trim(cast(unit_hint as string)) as unit_hint,
    trim(cast(country_name as string)) as country_name,
    trim(cast(country_id as string)) as country_id,
    upper(trim(cast(country_iso3 as string))) as country_iso3,
    
    safe_cast(value as FLOAT64)
   as indicator_value,
    trim(cast(wb_unit as string)) as wb_unit,
    trim(cast(obs_status as string)) as obs_status,
    
    safe_cast(decimal_places as INT64)
   as decimal_places

),
standardized as (
  select
    dt,
    coalesce(year, cast(extract(year from cast(dt as date)) as INT64)) as year,

    source_name,

    country_id,

    indicator_value,
    obs_status,
    decimal_places

),
deduplicated as (
  select
    *,
    row_number() over (
      partition by reporter_iso3, reporter_country_name_norm, year, indicator_code
      order by ingest_ts desc
    ) as _rn
  from standardized
  where year is not null
    and indicator_code is not null
),
final as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    reporter_country_name,
    reporter_country_name_norm,
    country_id,
    year,
    cast((year * 100) + 1 as integer) as period,
    concat(cast(year as string), '-01') as year_month,
    indicator_code,
    indicator_alias,
    indicator_id,
    indicator_name,
    indicator_value,
    unit,
    source_name,
    dataset,
    dt,
    ingest_ts,
    obs_status,
    decimal_places,
    coalesce(reporter_iso3, '') || '|' || cast(year as string) || '|' || indicator_code as grain_key
  from deduplicated
  where _rn = 1
)

select
  reporter_iso3,
  reporter_country_name,
  reporter_country_name_norm,
  country_id,
  year,
  period,
  year_month,
  indicator_code,
  indicator_alias,
  indicator_id,
  indicator_name,
  indicator_value,
  unit,
  source_name,

where reporter_iso3 is not null
  and indicator_code is not null
