model.capstone_monthly.mart_reporter_par.raw_code:
-- Monthly Looker Studio semantic mart for Page 4 partner, commodity, and chokepoint exposure detail.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date + reporter_iso3 + partner_iso3 + cmd_code + chokepoint_id.

with exposed_trade as (
  select
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('reporter_iso3') }} as reporter_iso3,
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('partner_iso3') }} as partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    trade_flow,
    trade_value_usd,
    net_weight_kg,
    gross_weight_kg,
    record_count,
    {{ canonicalize_chokepoint_name('main_chokepoint') }} as chokepoint_name,
    route_group,
    headline_exposure_group,
    route_confidence_score,
    route_applicability_status,
    used_transshipment_hub,
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('hub_iso3') }} as hub_iso3
  from {{ ref('fct_reporter_partner_commodity_route_month') }}
  where {{ clean_label_text('main_chokepoint') }} is not null
    and coalesce(is_maritime_routed, false)
),
aggregated_trade as (
  -- Route attributes are expected to be stable inside this grain because routing is assigned at pair level.
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_name,
    max(route_group) as route_group,
    max(headline_exposure_group) as headline_exposure_group,
    max(route_confidence_score) as route_confidence_score,
    max(route_applicability_status) as route_applicability_status,
    coalesce(max(used_transshipment_hub), false) as used_transshipment_hub_flag,
    max(hub_iso3) as hub_iso3,
    sum(trade_value_usd) as total_trade_value_usd,
    sum(case when lower(trade_flow) like '%import%' then trade_value_usd else 0 end) as import_trade_value_usd,
    sum(case when lower(trade_flow) like '%export%' then trade_value_usd else 0 end) as export_trade_value_usd,
    sum(net_weight_kg) as total_net_weight_kg,
    sum(gross_weight_kg) as total_gross_weight_kg,
    sum(record_count) as source_row_count
  from exposed_trade
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
),
with_chokepoint_id as (
  select
    a.*,
    dc.chokepoint_id
  from aggregated_trade as a
  left join {{ ref('dim_chokepoint') }} as dc
    on a.chokepoint_name = dc.chokepoint_name
),
reporter_month_totals as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    month_start_date,
    total_trade_value_usd as reporter_month_trade_value_usd
  from {{ ref('mart_reporter_month_trade_summary') }}
),
reporter_chokepoint_totals as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_trade_value_usd as reporter_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio
  from {{ ref('mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure') }}
),
stress_context as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    stress_index,
    stress_index_weighted,
    z_score_historical,
    stress_deviation_score_capped,
    stress_severity_band,
    event_active_flag,
    active_event_count
  from {{ ref('mart_chokepoint_monthly_stress_detail') }}
),
global_bounds as (
  select max(month_start_date) as latest_month_start_date
  from reporter_month_totals
)

select
  a.reporter_iso3,
  rc.country_name as reporter_country_name,
  rc.region as reporter_region,
  rc.subregion as reporter_subregion,
  rc.continent as reporter_continent,
  rc.is_eu as reporter_is_eu,
  rc.is_oecd as reporter_is_oecd,
  rc.is_country_map_eligible as reporter_is_country_map_eligible,
  a.partner_iso3,
  pc.country_name as partner_country_name,
  pc.region as partner_region,
  pc.subregion as partner_subregion,
  pc.continent as partner_continent,
  pc.is_eu as partner_is_eu,
  pc.is_oecd as partner_is_oecd,
  pc.is_country_map_eligible as partner_is_country_map_eligible,
  a.cmd_code,
  co.commodity_name,
  co.commodity_group,
  co.food_flag,
  co.energy_flag,
  co.industrial_flag,
  a.period,
  a.year_month,
  rmt.month_start_date,
  format_date('%b %Y', rmt.month_start_date) as month_label,
  a.chokepoint_id,
  a.chokepoint_name,
  a.route_group,
  a.headline_exposure_group,
  a.route_confidence_score,
  a.route_applicability_status,
  a.used_transshipment_hub_flag,
  a.hub_iso3,
  a.total_trade_value_usd,
  a.import_trade_value_usd,
  a.export_trade_value_usd,
  a.total_net_weight_kg,
  a.total_gross_weight_kg,
  a.source_row_count,
  rmt.reporter_month_trade_value_usd,
  rct.reporter_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
  rct.chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio,
  case
    when rmt.reporter_month_trade_value_usd = 0 then null
    else a.total_trade_value_usd / rmt.reporter_month_trade_value_usd
  end as chokepoint_exposed_trade_share_of_reporter_total,
  case
    when rct.reporter_chokepoint_trade_value_usd = 0 then null
    else a.total_trade_value_usd / rct.reporter_chokepoint_trade_value_usd
  end as partner_commodity_trade_share_of_reporter_chokepoint,
  sc.stress_index,
  sc.stress_index_weighted,
  sc.z_score_historical,
  sc.stress_deviation_score_capped,
  sc.stress_severity_band,
  coalesce(sc.event_active_flag, false) as event_active_flag,
  coalesce(sc.active_event_count, 0) as active_event_count,
  case
    when rmt.month_start_date = g.latest_month_start_date then true
    else false
  end as latest_month_flag
from with_chokepoint_id as a
inner join reporter_month_totals as rmt
  on a.reporter_iso3 = rmt.reporter_iso3
 and a.period = rmt.period
 and a.year_month = rmt.year_month
left join reporter_chokepoint_totals as rct
  on a.reporter_iso3 = rct.reporter_iso3
 and a.period = rct.period
 and a.year_month = rct.year_month
 and a.chokepoint_id = rct.chokepoint_id
left join stress_context as sc
  on a.year_month = sc.year_month
 and a.chokepoint_id = sc.chokepoint_id
left join {{ ref('dim_country') }} as rc
  on a.reporter_iso3 = rc.iso3
left join {{ ref('dim_country') }} as pc
  on a.partner_iso3 = pc.iso3
left join {{ ref('dim_commodity') }} as co
  on a.cmd_code = co.cmd_code
cross join global_bounds as g
model.capstone_monthly.mart_reporter_par.compiled_code:
-- Monthly Looker Studio semantic mart for Page 4 partner, commodity, and chokepoint exposure detail.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date + reporter_iso3 + partner_iso3 + cmd_code + chokepoint_id.

with exposed_trade as (
  select
    case
    when 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is null then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('NULL', 'N/A', 'NA', 'NONE', 'UNKNOWN', 'UNK', 'NAN') then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'ROM' then 'ROU'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(

          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'UK' then 'GBR'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'US' then 'USA'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )

    case

        )
      ),

    )
  ) in ('NULL', 'N/A', 'NA', 'NONE', 'UNKNOWN', 'UNK', 'NAN') then null
    when upper(
    nullif(

        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),

    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(hub_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  )
  end as hub_iso3
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`fct_reporter_partner_commodity_route_month`
  where 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(main_chokepoint as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is not null
    and coalesce(is_maritime_routed, false)
),
aggregated_trade as (
  -- Route attributes are expected to be stable inside this grain because routing is assigned at pair level.
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_name,
    max(route_group) as route_group,
    max(headline_exposure_group) as headline_exposure_group,
    max(route_confidence_score) as route_confidence_score,
    max(route_applicability_status) as route_applicability_status,
    coalesce(max(used_transshipment_hub), false) as used_transshipment_hub_flag,
    max(hub_iso3) as hub_iso3,
    sum(trade_value_usd) as total_trade_value_usd,
    sum(case when lower(trade_flow) like '%import%' then trade_value_usd else 0 end) as import_trade_value_usd,
    sum(case when lower(trade_flow) like '%export%' then trade_value_usd else 0 end) as export_trade_value_usd,
    sum(net_weight_kg) as total_net_weight_kg,
    sum(gross_weight_kg) as total_gross_weight_kg,
    sum(record_count) as source_row_count
  from exposed_trade
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
),
with_chokepoint_id as (
  select
    a.*,
    dc.chokepoint_id
  from aggregated_trade as a
  left join `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`dim_chokepoint` as dc
    on a.chokepoint_name = dc.chokepoint_name
),
reporter_month_totals as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    month_start_date,
    total_trade_value_usd as reporter_month_trade_value_usd
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`mart_reporter_month_trade_summary`
),
reporter_chokepoint_totals as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_trade_value_usd as reporter_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure`
),
stress_context as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    stress_index,
    stress_index_weighted,
    z_score_historical,
    stress_deviation_score_capped,
    stress_severity_band,
    event_active_flag,
    active_event_count
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`mart_chokepoint_monthly_stress_detail`
),
global_bounds as (
  select max(month_start_date) as latest_month_start_date
  from reporter_month_totals
)

select
  a.reporter_iso3,
  rc.country_name as reporter_country_name,
  rc.region as reporter_region,
  rc.subregion as reporter_subregion,
  rc.continent as reporter_continent,
  rc.is_eu as reporter_is_eu,
  rc.is_oecd as reporter_is_oecd,
  rc.is_country_map_eligible as reporter_is_country_map_eligible,
  a.partner_iso3,
  pc.country_name as partner_country_name,
  pc.region as partner_region,
  pc.subregion as partner_subregion,
  pc.continent as partner_continent,
  pc.is_eu as partner_is_eu,
  pc.is_oecd as partner_is_oecd,
  pc.is_country_map_eligible as partner_is_country_map_eligible,
  a.cmd_code,
  co.commodity_name,
  co.commodity_group,
  co.food_flag,
  co.energy_flag,
  co.industrial_flag,
  a.period,
  a.year_month,
  rmt.month_start_date,
  format_date('%b %Y', rmt.month_start_date) as month_label,
  a.chokepoint_id,
  a.chokepoint_name,
  a.route_group,
  a.headline_exposure_group,
  a.route_confidence_score,
  a.route_applicability_status,
  a.used_transshipment_hub_flag,
  a.hub_iso3,
  a.total_trade_value_usd,
  a.import_trade_value_usd,
  a.export_trade_value_usd,
  a.total_net_weight_kg,
  a.total_gross_weight_kg,
  a.source_row_count,
  rmt.reporter_month_trade_value_usd,
  rct.reporter_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
  rct.chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio,
  case
    when rmt.reporter_month_trade_value_usd = 0 then null
    else a.total_trade_value_usd / rmt.reporter_month_trade_value_usd
  end as chokepoint_exposed_trade_share_of_reporter_total,
  case
    when rct.reporter_chokepoint_trade_value_usd = 0 then null
    else a.total_trade_value_usd / rct.reporter_chokepoint_trade_value_usd
  end as partner_commodity_trade_share_of_reporter_chokepoint,
  sc.stress_index,
  sc.stress_index_weighted,
  sc.z_score_historical,
  sc.stress_deviation_score_capped,
  sc.stress_severity_band,
  coalesce(sc.event_active_flag, false) as event_active_flag,
  coalesce(sc.active_event_count, 0) as active_event_count,
  case
    when rmt.month_start_date = g.latest_month_start_date then true
    else false
  end as latest_month_flag
from with_chokepoint_id as a
inner join reporter_month_totals as rmt
  on a.reporter_iso3 = rmt.reporter_iso3
 and a.period = rmt.period
 and a.year_month = rmt.year_month
left join reporter_chokepoint_totals as rct
  on a.reporter_iso3 = rct.reporter_iso3
 and a.period = rct.period
 and a.year_month = rct.year_month
 and a.chokepoint_id = rct.chokepoint_id
left join stress_context as sc
  on a.year_month = sc.year_month
 and a.chokepoint_id = sc.chokepoint_id
left join `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`dim_country` as rc
  on a.reporter_iso3 = rc.iso3
left join `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`dim_country` as pc
  on a.partner_iso3 = pc.iso3
left join `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`dim_commodity` as co
  on a.cmd_code = co.cmd_code
cross join global_bounds as g

model.capstone_monthly.mart_global_month.name: mart_global_monthly_system_stress_summary
model.capstone_monthly.mart_global_month.description: Monthly scorecard semantic mart for Page 3 and executive monthly system snapshots, aggregating monthly chokepoint stress signals to one row per month.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First calendar day of the month used directly in Looker Studio month filters and scorecards.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.description: Canonical month key in YYYY-MM format for display and sorting support.

observed_chokepoint_count.name: observed_chokepoint_count
observed_chokepoint_count.description: Number of chokepoints with observed monthly PortWatch stress rows in the month.

expected_chokepoint_count.name: expected_chokepoint_count
expected_chokepoint_count.description: Number of chokepoints in the full monthly stress scope, repeated on every row for scorecards.

monthly_coverage_ratio.name: monthly_coverage_ratio
monthly_coverage_ratio.description: Share of chokepoints with observed monthly stress rows in the month, expressed as a 0 to 1 ratio.

monthly_source_coverage_status.name: monthly_source_coverage_status
monthly_source_coverage_status.description: Coverage status band showing whether the monthly PortWatch scope is full, partial, or absent for the month.

avg_stress_index.name: avg_stress_index
avg_stress_index.description: Average monthly blended stress index across observed chokepoints.

avg_stress_index_weighted.name: avg_stress_index_weighted
avg_stress_index_weighted.description: Average monthly weighted stress index across observed chokepoints.

avg_abs_z_score_historical.name: avg_abs_z_score_historical
avg_abs_z_score_historical.description: Average absolute historical throughput z-score across observed chokepoints in the month.

max_abs_z_score_historical.name: max_abs_z_score_historical
max_abs_z_score_historical.description: Maximum absolute historical throughput z-score across observed chokepoints in the month.

stressed_chokepoint_count.name: stressed_chokepoint_count
stressed_chokepoint_count.description: Count of chokepoints with an absolute historical throughput z-score of at least one standard deviation in the month.

event_impacted_chokepoint_count.name: event_impacted_chokepoint_count
event_impacted_chokepoint_count.description: Count of chokepoints with at least one active linked event in the month.

system_stress_level.name: system_stress_level
system_stress_level.description: Monthly system severity band derived from the strongest observed historical z-score magnitude.

latest_month_flag.name: latest_month_flag
latest_month_flag.description: True when the row belongs to the latest available month in the monthly system summary mart.

model.capstone_monthly.mart_global_month.raw_code:
-- Monthly Looker Studio scorecard mart for Page 3.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date.

with base as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    z_score_historical,
    stress_index,
    stress_index_weighted,
    event_active_flag
  from {{ ref('mart_chokepoint_monthly_stress') }}
),
expected_chokepoints as (
  select count(distinct chokepoint_id) as expected_chokepoint_count
  from base
),
monthly_agg as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    max(year_month) as year_month,
    count(distinct chokepoint_id) as observed_chokepoint_count,
    avg(stress_index) as avg_stress_index,
    avg(stress_index_weighted) as avg_stress_index_weighted,
    avg(abs(z_score_historical)) as avg_abs_z_score_historical,
    max(abs(z_score_historical)) as max_abs_z_score_historical,
    count(
      distinct case
        when z_score_historical is not null
          and abs(z_score_historical) >= 1 then chokepoint_id
      end
    ) as stressed_chokepoint_count,
    count(
      distinct case
        when event_active_flag then chokepoint_id
      end
    ) as event_impacted_chokepoint_count
  from base
  group by 1
),
latest_month as (
  select max(month_start_date) as latest_month_start_date
  from monthly_agg
)

select
  m.month_start_date,
  m.year_month,
  m.observed_chokepoint_count,
  e.expected_chokepoint_count,
  {{ safe_divide('m.observed_chokepoint_count', 'e.expected_chokepoint_count') }} as monthly_coverage_ratio,
  case
    when m.observed_chokepoint_count = 0 then 'NO_PORTWATCH_DATA'
    when m.observed_chokepoint_count = e.expected_chokepoint_count then 'FULL_COVERAGE'
    else 'PARTIAL_COVERAGE'
  end as monthly_source_coverage_status,
  m.avg_stress_index,
  m.avg_stress_index_weighted,
  m.avg_abs_z_score_historical,
  m.max_abs_z_score_historical,
  m.stressed_chokepoint_count,
  m.event_impacted_chokepoint_count,
  case
    when m.observed_chokepoint_count = 0 then 'NO_PORTWATCH_DATA'
    when m.max_abs_z_score_historical is null then 'INSUFFICIENT_BASELINE'
    when m.max_abs_z_score_historical >= 2 then 'SEVERE'
    when m.max_abs_z_score_historical >= 1 then 'ELEVATED'
    else 'NORMAL'
  end as system_stress_level,
  case when m.month_start_date = l.latest_month_start_date then true else false end as latest_month_flag
from monthly_agg as m
cross join expected_chokepoints as e
cross join latest_month as l
model.capstone_monthly.mart_global_month.compiled_code:
-- Monthly Looker Studio scorecard mart for Page 3.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date.

with base as (

    month_start_date,

    chokepoint_id,
    z_score_historical,
    stress_index,
    stress_index_weighted,
    event_active_flag

),
expected_chokepoints as (
  select count(distinct chokepoint_id) as expected_chokepoint_count
  from base
),
monthly_agg as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    max(year_month) as year_month,
    count(distinct chokepoint_id) as observed_chokepoint_count,
    avg(stress_index) as avg_stress_index,
    avg(stress_index_weighted) as avg_stress_index_weighted,
    avg(abs(z_score_historical)) as avg_abs_z_score_historical,
    max(abs(z_score_historical)) as max_abs_z_score_historical,
    count(
      distinct case
        when z_score_historical is not null
          and abs(z_score_historical) >= 1 then chokepoint_id
      end
    ) as stressed_chokepoint_count,
    count(
      distinct case
        when event_active_flag then chokepoint_id
      end
    ) as event_impacted_chokepoint_count
  from base
  group by 1
),
latest_month as (
  select max(month_start_date) as latest_month_start_date
  from monthly_agg
)

select
  m.month_start_date,
  m.year_month,
  m.observed_chokepoint_count,
  e.expected_chokepoint_count,
  case
    when e.expected_chokepoint_count is null or e.expected_chokepoint_count = 0 then null
    else (m.observed_chokepoint_count) / (e.expected_chokepoint_count)
  end as monthly_coverage_ratio,
  case
    when m.observed_chokepoint_count = 0 then 'NO_PORTWATCH_DATA'
    when m.observed_chokepoint_count = e.expected_chokepoint_count then 'FULL_COVERAGE'
    else 'PARTIAL_COVERAGE'
  end as monthly_source_coverage_status,
  m.avg_stress_index,
  m.avg_stress_index_weighted,
  m.avg_abs_z_score_historical,
  m.max_abs_z_score_historical,
  m.stressed_chokepoint_count,
  m.event_impacted_chokepoint_count,
  case
    when m.observed_chokepoint_count = 0 then 'NO_PORTWATCH_DATA'
    when m.max_abs_z_score_historical is null then 'INSUFFICIENT_BASELINE'
    when m.max_abs_z_score_historical >= 2 then 'SEVERE'
    when m.max_abs_z_score_historical >= 1 then 'ELEVATED'
    else 'NORMAL'
  end as system_stress_level,
  case when m.month_start_date = l.latest_month_start_date then true else false end as latest_month_flag
from monthly_agg as m
cross join expected_chokepoints as e
cross join latest_month as l

model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_d.name: mart_chokepoint_daily_signal
model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_d.description: Daily semantic mart for Page 2 chokepoint operational visuals, exposing daily throughput and vessel-count signals at date-day and chokepoint grain while preserving missing-data visibility.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.description: Calendar day field used directly in Looker Studio date filters and daily trend charts.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First calendar day of the row's month, retained for mixed day-level and month-level filtering without changing grain.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.description: Canonical month label in YYYY-MM format for display and sorting support.

chokepoint_id.name: chokepoint_id
chokepoint_id.description: Stable canonical chokepoint identifier for controlled filters and joins.

chokepoint_name.name: chokepoint_name
chokepoint_name.description: Standardized chokepoint display name for chart dimensions and filter controls.

portwatch_source_chokepoint_id.name: portwatch_source_chokepoint_id
portwatch_source_chokepoint_id.description: Source PortWatch chokepoint identifier retained for lineage and auditability.

has_portwatch_daily_data_flag.name: has_portwatch_daily_data_flag
has_portwatch_daily_data_flag.description: True when the day and chokepoint have an observed PortWatch source row.

throughput_metric.name: throughput_metric
throughput_metric.description: Daily throughput proxy from PortWatch capacity.

vessel_count_metric.name: vessel_count_metric
vessel_count_metric.description: Daily total vessel count from PortWatch.

vessel_size_index.name: vessel_size_index
vessel_size_index.description: Daily average vessel size proxy computed as throughput divided by vessel count.

priority_vessel_share.name: priority_vessel_share
priority_vessel_share.description: Chokepoint-specific priority vessel class share aligned to the monthly stress logic.

observed_days_in_7d_window.name: observed_days_in_7d_window
observed_days_in_7d_window.description: Count of observed prior days contributing to the 7-day trailing baseline.

observed_days_in_30d_window.name: observed_days_in_30d_window
observed_days_in_30d_window.description: Count of observed prior days contributing to the 30-day trailing baseline.

rolling_mean_7d.name: rolling_mean_7d
rolling_mean_7d.description: Prior 7-calendar-day average of throughput_metric, excluding the current day.

rolling_mean_30d.name: rolling_mean_30d
rolling_mean_30d.description: Prior 30-calendar-day average of throughput_metric, excluding the current day.

rolling_stddev_30d.name: rolling_stddev_30d
rolling_stddev_30d.description: Prior 30-calendar-day population standard deviation of throughput_metric.

z_score_rolling_30d.name: z_score_rolling_30d
z_score_rolling_30d.description: Current throughput deviation from the prior 30-day baseline, expressed in standard deviations.

vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d.name: vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d
vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d.description: Prior 30-calendar-day population standard deviation of vessel_count_metric.

vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d.name: vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d
vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d.description: Current vessel-count deviation from the prior 30-day baseline, expressed in standard deviations.

signal_index_rolling_30d.name: signal_index_rolling_30d
signal_index_rolling_30d.description: Simple daily composite signal index averaging throughput and vessel-count 30-day z-scores.

pct_change_1d.name: pct_change_1d
pct_change_1d.description: Percentage throughput change versus the prior calendar day when both days have observed values.

pct_change_7d.name: pct_change_7d
pct_change_7d.description: Percentage throughput change versus seven calendar days earlier when both days have observed values.

latest_observed_date_day.name: latest_observed_date_day
latest_observed_date_day.description: Latest day on which the chokepoint has an observed PortWatch daily value.

days_since_latest_observation.name: days_since_latest_observation
days_since_latest_observation.description: Number of calendar days between the mart's latest day and the chokepoint's latest observed day.

latest_day_flag.name: latest_day_flag
latest_day_flag.description: True when the row belongs to the latest day present in the PortWatch daily calendar.

latest_observed_day_flag.name: latest_observed_day_flag
latest_observed_day_flag.description: True when the row belongs to the chokepoint's most recent observed day with real PortWatch data.

direction_of_change.name: direction_of_change
direction_of_change.description: Simple direction label comparing current throughput to the prior calendar day.

alert_band.name: alert_band
alert_band.description: Daily throughput z-score severity band used for Page 2 tables and conditional formatting.

model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_d.raw_code:
-- Daily Looker Studio semantic mart for Page 2.
-- Grain: one row per date_day + chokepoint_id.

with base as (
  select
    date_day,
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    has_portwatch_daily_data_flag,
    capacity as throughput_metric,
    n_total as vessel_count_metric,
    vessel_size_index,
    tanker_share,
    container_share,
    dry_bulk_share,
    priority_vessel_share
  from {{ ref('stg_portwatch_daily') }}
),
freshness as (
  select
    chokepoint_id,
    max(case when has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 1 then date_day end) as latest_observed_date_day
  from base
  group by 1
),
global_bounds as (
  select max(date_day) as latest_date_day
  from base
),
windowed as (
  select
    b.*,
    count(throughput_metric) over trailing_7d as observed_days_in_7d_window,
    count(throughput_metric) over trailing_30d as observed_days_in_30d_window,
    avg(throughput_metric) over trailing_7d as rolling_mean_7d,
    avg(throughput_metric) over trailing_30d as rolling_mean_30d,
    stddev_pop(throughput_metric) over trailing_30d as rolling_stddev_30d,
    avg(vessel_count_metric) over trailing_7d as vessel_count_rolling_mean_7d,
    avg(vessel_count_metric) over trailing_30d as vessel_count_rolling_mean_30d,
    stddev_pop(vessel_count_metric) over trailing_30d as vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d,
    lag(throughput_metric, 1) over (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by date_day
    ) as throughput_metric_1d_ago,
    lag(throughput_metric, 7) over (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by date_day
    ) as throughput_metric_7d_ago
  from base as b
  window
    trailing_7d as (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by date_day
      rows between 7 preceding and 1 preceding
    ),
    trailing_30d as (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by date_day
      rows between 30 preceding and 1 preceding
    )
),
scored as (
  select
    w.date_day,
    w.month_start_date,
    w.year_month,
    w.chokepoint_id,
    w.chokepoint_name,
    w.portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag,
    w.throughput_metric,
    w.vessel_count_metric,
    w.vessel_size_index,
    w.tanker_share,
    w.container_share,
    w.dry_bulk_share,
    w.priority_vessel_share,
    w.observed_days_in_7d_window,
    w.observed_days_in_30d_window,
    w.rolling_mean_7d,
    w.rolling_mean_30d,
    w.rolling_stddev_30d,
    case
      when w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then null
      when w.observed_days_in_30d_window < 2
        or w.rolling_stddev_30d is null
        or w.rolling_stddev_30d = 0 then null
      else (w.throughput_metric - w.rolling_mean_30d) / w.rolling_stddev_30d
    end as z_score_rolling_30d,
    w.vessel_count_rolling_mean_7d,
    w.vessel_count_rolling_mean_30d,
    w.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d,
    case
      when w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then null
      when w.observed_days_in_30d_window < 2
        or w.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d is null
        or w.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d = 0 then null
      else (w.vessel_count_metric - w.vessel_count_rolling_mean_30d) / w.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d
    end as vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d,
    case
      when w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then null
      when w.throughput_metric_1d_ago is null or w.throughput_metric_1d_ago = 0 then null
      else (w.throughput_metric - w.throughput_metric_1d_ago) / w.throughput_metric_1d_ago
    end as pct_change_1d,
    case
      when w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then null
      when w.throughput_metric_7d_ago is null or w.throughput_metric_7d_ago = 0 then null
      else (w.throughput_metric - w.throughput_metric_7d_ago) / w.throughput_metric_7d_ago
    end as pct_change_7d
  from windowed as w
),
final as (
  select
    s.date_day,
    s.month_start_date,
    s.year_month,
    s.chokepoint_id,
    s.chokepoint_name,
    s.portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    s.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag,
    s.throughput_metric,
    s.vessel_count_metric,
    s.vessel_size_index,
    s.tanker_share,
    s.container_share,
    s.dry_bulk_share,
    s.priority_vessel_share,
    s.observed_days_in_7d_window,
    s.observed_days_in_30d_window,
    s.rolling_mean_7d,
    s.rolling_mean_30d,
    s.rolling_stddev_30d,
    s.z_score_rolling_30d,
    s.vessel_count_rolling_mean_7d,
    s.vessel_count_rolling_mean_30d,
    s.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d,
    s.vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d,
    case
      when s.z_score_rolling_30d is null or s.vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d is null then null
      else 0.5 * s.z_score_rolling_30d + 0.5 * s.vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d
    end as signal_index_rolling_30d,
    s.pct_change_1d,
    s.pct_change_7d,
    f.latest_observed_date_day,
    {{ day_diff('g.latest_date_day', 'f.latest_observed_date_day') }} as days_since_latest_observation,
    case when s.date_day = g.latest_date_day then true else false end as latest_day_flag,
    case when s.date_day = f.latest_observed_date_day then true else false end as latest_observed_day_flag,
    case
      when s.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then 'NO_DATA'
      when s.pct_change_1d is null then 'NO_PRIOR_DAY'
      when s.pct_change_1d > 0 then 'UP'
      when s.pct_change_1d < 0 then 'DOWN'
      else 'FLAT'
    end as direction_of_change,
    -- Z-score bands are intentionally simple and are based on absolute deviation
    -- from the prior 30-day baseline.
    case
      when s.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then 'NO_DATA'
      when s.z_score_rolling_30d is null then 'INSUFFICIENT_BASELINE'
      when abs(s.z_score_rolling_30d) >= 2 then 'SEVERE'
      when abs(s.z_score_rolling_30d) >= 1 then 'ELEVATED'
      else 'NORMAL'
    end as alert_band
  from scored as s
  left join freshness as f
    on s.chokepoint_id = f.chokepoint_id
  cross join global_bounds as g
)

select *
from final
model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_d.compiled_code:
-- Daily Looker Studio semantic mart for Page 2.
-- Grain: one row per date_day + chokepoint_id.

with base as (
  select
    date_day,
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    has_portwatch_daily_data_flag,
    capacity as throughput_metric,
    n_total as vessel_count_metric,
    vessel_size_index,
    tanker_share,
    container_share,
    dry_bulk_share,
    priority_vessel_share
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_portwatch_daily`
),
freshness as (
  select
    chokepoint_id,
    max(case when has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 1 then date_day end) as latest_observed_date_day
  from base
  group by 1
),
global_bounds as (
  select max(date_day) as latest_date_day
  from base
),
windowed as (
  select
    b.*,
    count(throughput_metric) over trailing_7d as observed_days_in_7d_window,
    count(throughput_metric) over trailing_30d as observed_days_in_30d_window,
    avg(throughput_metric) over trailing_7d as rolling_mean_7d,
    avg(throughput_metric) over trailing_30d as rolling_mean_30d,
    stddev_pop(throughput_metric) over trailing_30d as rolling_stddev_30d,
    avg(vessel_count_metric) over trailing_7d as vessel_count_rolling_mean_7d,
    avg(vessel_count_metric) over trailing_30d as vessel_count_rolling_mean_30d,
    stddev_pop(vessel_count_metric) over trailing_30d as vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d,
    lag(throughput_metric, 1) over (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by date_day
    ) as throughput_metric_1d_ago,
    lag(throughput_metric, 7) over (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by date_day
    ) as throughput_metric_7d_ago
  from base as b
  window
    trailing_7d as (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by date_day
      rows between 7 preceding and 1 preceding
    ),
    trailing_30d as (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by date_day
      rows between 30 preceding and 1 preceding
    )
),
scored as (
  select
    w.date_day,
    w.month_start_date,
    w.year_month,
    w.chokepoint_id,
    w.chokepoint_name,
    w.portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag,
    w.throughput_metric,
    w.vessel_count_metric,
    w.vessel_size_index,
    w.tanker_share,
    w.container_share,
    w.dry_bulk_share,
    w.priority_vessel_share,
    w.observed_days_in_7d_window,
    w.observed_days_in_30d_window,
    w.rolling_mean_7d,
    w.rolling_mean_30d,
    w.rolling_stddev_30d,
    case
      when w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then null
      when w.observed_days_in_30d_window < 2
        or w.rolling_stddev_30d is null
        or w.rolling_stddev_30d = 0 then null
      else (w.throughput_metric - w.rolling_mean_30d) / w.rolling_stddev_30d
    end as z_score_rolling_30d,
    w.vessel_count_rolling_mean_7d,
    w.vessel_count_rolling_mean_30d,
    w.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d,
    case
      when w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then null
      when w.observed_days_in_30d_window < 2
        or w.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d is null
        or w.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d = 0 then null
      else (w.vessel_count_metric - w.vessel_count_rolling_mean_30d) / w.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d
    end as vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d,
    case
      when w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then null
      when w.throughput_metric_1d_ago is null or w.throughput_metric_1d_ago = 0 then null
      else (w.throughput_metric - w.throughput_metric_1d_ago) / w.throughput_metric_1d_ago
    end as pct_change_1d,
    case
      when w.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then null
      when w.throughput_metric_7d_ago is null or w.throughput_metric_7d_ago = 0 then null
      else (w.throughput_metric - w.throughput_metric_7d_ago) / w.throughput_metric_7d_ago
    end as pct_change_7d
  from windowed as w
),
final as (
  select
    s.date_day,
    s.month_start_date,
    s.year_month,
    s.chokepoint_id,
    s.chokepoint_name,
    s.portwatch_source_chokepoint_id,
    s.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag,
    s.throughput_metric,
    s.vessel_count_metric,
    s.vessel_size_index,
    s.tanker_share,
    s.container_share,
    s.dry_bulk_share,
    s.priority_vessel_share,
    s.observed_days_in_7d_window,
    s.observed_days_in_30d_window,
    s.rolling_mean_7d,
    s.rolling_mean_30d,
    s.rolling_stddev_30d,
    s.z_score_rolling_30d,
    s.vessel_count_rolling_mean_7d,
    s.vessel_count_rolling_mean_30d,
    s.vessel_count_rolling_stddev_30d,
    s.vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d,
    case
      when s.z_score_rolling_30d is null or s.vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d is null then null
      else 0.5 * s.z_score_rolling_30d + 0.5 * s.vessel_count_z_score_rolling_30d
    end as signal_index_rolling_30d,
    s.pct_change_1d,
    s.pct_change_7d,
    f.latest_observed_date_day,
    
    date_diff(cast(g.latest_date_day as date), cast(f.latest_observed_date_day as date), day)
   as days_since_latest_observation,
    case when s.date_day = g.latest_date_day then true else false end as latest_day_flag,
    case when s.date_day = f.latest_observed_date_day then true else false end as latest_observed_day_flag,
    case
      when s.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then 'NO_DATA'
      when s.pct_change_1d is null then 'NO_PRIOR_DAY'
      when s.pct_change_1d > 0 then 'UP'
      when s.pct_change_1d < 0 then 'DOWN'
      else 'FLAT'
    end as direction_of_change,
    -- Z-score bands are intentionally simple and are based on absolute deviation
    -- from the prior 30-day baseline.
    case
      when s.has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 0 then 'NO_DATA'
      when s.z_score_rolling_30d is null then 'INSUFFICIENT_BASELINE'
      when abs(s.z_score_rolling_30d) >= 2 then 'SEVERE'
      when abs(s.z_score_rolling_30d) >= 1 then 'ELEVATED'
      else 'NORMAL'
    end as alert_band
  from scored as s
  left join freshness as f
    on s.chokepoint_id = f.chokepoint_id
  cross join global_bounds as g
)

select *
from final

model.capstone_monthly.mart_reporter_str.name: mart_reporter_structural_vulnerability
model.capstone_monthly.mart_reporter_str.description: Page 5 semantic mart at one row per reporter and month, combining annual energy vulnerability, monthly chokepoint exposure, historical event exposure, trade scale, and supplier/import concentration for executive structural-risk storytelling.

reporter_iso3.name: reporter_iso3
reporter_iso3.description: ISO3 code of the reporting country. Aggregate/group geographies are excluded upstream.

reporter_name.name: reporter_name
reporter_name.description: Business-readable reporter country name used for scatter labels, tables, and scorecards.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First calendar day of the month; primary date field for Looker Studio controls.

period.name: period
period.description: Integer month key in YYYYMM format.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.description: Canonical month key in YYYY-MM format.

total_trade_value_usd.name: total_trade_value_usd
total_trade_value_usd.description: Reporter total monthly trade value in USD, suitable for scatter bubble size.

total_import_value_usd.name: total_import_value_usd
total_import_value_usd.description: Reporter total monthly import value in USD.

energy_import_pct.name: energy_import_pct
energy_import_pct.description: World Bank dependency-on-imported-energy indicator broadcast from annual reporter-year data to reporter-month grain. Net exporters can be negative.

renewable_share_pct.name: renewable_share_pct
renewable_share_pct.description: World Bank renewable energy share percentage, broadcast from annual reporter-year data.

fossil_share_pct.name: fossil_share_pct
fossil_share_pct.description: Fossil electricity share percentage, using reported fossil share when available and otherwise the bounded sum of oil, gas, and coal electricity shares.

chokepoint_exposure_pct.name: chokepoint_exposure_pct
chokepoint_exposure_pct.description: Percent of reporter monthly trade value exposed to modeled chokepoint routes after aggregating reporter-month-chokepoint rows.

chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd.name: chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd
chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd.description: Reporter monthly trade value in USD exposed to modeled chokepoint routes.

exposed_chokepoint_count.name: exposed_chokepoint_count
exposed_chokepoint_count.description: Count of distinct chokepoints carrying exposed reporter trade in the month.

historical_event_count.name: historical_event_count
historical_event_count.description: Cumulative count of distinct active disruption events historically linked to the reporter through exposed chokepoints as of the selected month.

avg_event_severity.name: avg_event_severity
avg_event_severity.description: Average severity weight across historical reporter-linked events as of the selected month.

max_event_severity.name: max_event_severity
max_event_severity.description: Maximum severity weight across historical reporter-linked events as of the selected month.

most_recent_event_date.name: most_recent_event_date
most_recent_event_date.description: Most recent event start date among historical reporter-linked events as of the selected month.

top_supplier_iso3.name: top_supplier_iso3
top_supplier_iso3.description: ISO3 code for the reporter's largest country supplier by monthly import value.

top_supplier_name.name: top_supplier_name
top_supplier_name.description: Business-readable name for the reporter's largest country supplier by monthly import value.

top_supplier_share_pct.name: top_supplier_share_pct
top_supplier_share_pct.description: Percent of country-supplier import value represented by the top supplier.

supplier_concentration_pct.name: supplier_concentration_pct
supplier_concentration_pct.description: Import concentration percentage currently equal to top supplier share; kept as a business-facing dependency measure.

top_commodity_code.name: top_commodity_code
top_commodity_code.description: Top imported commodity code for the reporter-month.

top_commodity_name.name: top_commodity_name
top_commodity_name.description: Business-readable top imported commodity name for the reporter-month.

top_commodity_import_share_pct.name: top_commodity_import_share_pct
top_commodity_import_share_pct.description: Percent of total reporter imports represented by the top imported commodity.

structural_risk_score.name: structural_risk_score
structural_risk_score.description: Weighted 0-100 structural vulnerability score combining energy import dependence, chokepoint exposure, renewable gap, fossil dependence, supplier concentration, and event history.

structural_vulnerability_input_status.name: structural_vulnerability_input_status
structural_vulnerability_input_status.description: Diagnostic label showing whether core Page 5 inputs are complete for the reporter-month.

structural_risk_rank_in_month.name: structural_risk_rank_in_month
structural_risk_rank_in_month.description: Rank of reporter structural vulnerability score inside the month; use 1 for highest-risk scorecards.

is_highest_structural_risk_reporter.name: is_highest_structural_risk_reporter
is_highest_structural_risk_reporter.description: True for the reporter with the highest structural risk score in the month.

latest_month_flag.name: latest_month_flag
latest_month_flag.description: True when the row belongs to the latest available month in the mart.

model.capstone_monthly.mart_reporter_str.raw_code:
-- Monthly Looker Studio semantic mart for Page 5 Structural Vulnerability.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date + reporter_iso3.

with eligible_reporters as (
  select
    iso3,
    country_name,
    region,
    subregion,
    continent,
    is_eu,
    is_oecd
  from {{ ref('dim_country') }}
  where is_country_map_eligible
),
reporter_month as (
  select
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('rm.reporter_iso3') }} as reporter_iso3,
    er.country_name as reporter_name,
    er.region as reporter_region,
    er.subregion as reporter_subregion,
    er.continent as reporter_continent,
    er.is_eu as reporter_is_eu,
    er.is_oecd as reporter_is_oecd,
    rm.period,
    rm.year_month,
    rm.month_start_date,
    format_date('%b %Y', rm.month_start_date) as month_label,
    rm.year,
    rm.month,
    rm.quarter,
    rm.total_trade_value_usd,
    rm.import_trade_value_usd as total_import_value_usd,
    rm.export_trade_value_usd as total_export_value_usd
  from {{ ref('mart_reporter_month_trade_summary') }} as rm
  inner join eligible_reporters as er
    on {{ canonical_country_iso3('rm.reporter_iso3') }} = er.iso3
),
energy_annual_pivot as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    year,
    max(case when indicator_code = 'renewables_share' then indicator_value end) as renewable_share_pct,
    max(case when indicator_code = 'fossil_fuels_share' then indicator_value end) as fossil_share_pct_reported,
    max(case when indicator_code = 'dependency_on_imported_energy' then indicator_value end) as energy_import_pct,
    max(case when indicator_code = 'oil_electricity_share' then indicator_value end) as oil_electricity_share_pct,
    max(case when indicator_code = 'gas_electricity_share' then indicator_value end) as gas_electricity_share_pct,
    max(case when indicator_code = 'coal_electricity_share' then indicator_value end) as coal_electricity_share_pct
  from {{ ref('mart_reporter_energy_vulnerability') }}
  group by 1, 2
),
energy_profile as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    year,
    energy_import_pct,
    renewable_share_pct,
    case
      when fossil_share_pct_reported is not null and fossil_share_pct_reported <> 0 then fossil_share_pct_reported
      when coalesce(oil_electricity_share_pct, 0)
        + coalesce(gas_electricity_share_pct, 0)
        + coalesce(coal_electricity_share_pct, 0) > 0
        then least(
          coalesce(oil_electricity_share_pct, 0)
            + coalesce(gas_electricity_share_pct, 0)
            + coalesce(coal_electricity_share_pct, 0),
          100
        )
      else fossil_share_pct_reported
    end as fossil_share_pct,
    oil_electricity_share_pct,
    gas_electricity_share_pct,
    coal_electricity_share_pct
  from energy_annual_pivot
),
chokepoint_exposure_month as (
  select
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('reporter_iso3') }} as reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    max(month_start_date) as month_start_date,
    sum(chokepoint_trade_value_usd) as chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd,
    least(sum(coalesce(chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio, 0)), 1.0) * 100 as chokepoint_exposure_pct,
    count(distinct chokepoint_id) as exposed_chokepoint_count,
    sum(route_pair_count) as exposed_route_pair_count,
    count(distinct case when active_event_count > 0 then chokepoint_id end) as event_impacted_exposed_chokepoint_count,
    max(stress_index_weighted) as max_exposed_chokepoint_stress_index_weighted,
    case
      when sum(case when stress_index_weighted is not null then chokepoint_trade_value_usd else 0 end) = 0 then null
      else sum(case when stress_index_weighted is not null then chokepoint_trade_value_usd * stress_index_weighted else 0 end)
        / sum(case when stress_index_weighted is not null then chokepoint_trade_value_usd else 0 end)
    end as trade_value_weighted_stress_index_weighted
  from {{ ref('mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure') }}
  group by 1, 2, 3
),
top_chokepoint_candidates as (
  select
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('reporter_iso3') }} as reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio * 100 as chokepoint_trade_exposure_pct,
    row_number() over (
      partition by {{ canonical_country_iso3('reporter_iso3') }}, period
      order by chokepoint_trade_value_usd desc, chokepoint_name
    ) as exposure_rank
  from {{ ref('mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure') }}
),
top_chokepoint as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id as top_exposed_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name as top_exposed_chokepoint_name,
    chokepoint_trade_value_usd as top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    chokepoint_trade_exposure_pct as top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_share_pct
  from top_chokepoint_candidates
  where exposure_rank = 1
),
active_reporter_event_month as (
  select distinct
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('e.reporter_iso3') }} as reporter_iso3,
    cb.event_id,
    cb.event_name,
    cb.month_start_date as event_month_start_date,
    de.event_start_date,
    cb.severity_weight
  from {{ ref('mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure') }} as e
  inner join {{ ref('stg_chokepoint_bridge') }} as cb
    on e.year_month = cb.year_month
   and e.chokepoint_name = cb.chokepoint_name
  left join {{ ref('dim_event') }} as de
    on cb.event_id = de.event_id
  where cb.is_event_active
),
reporter_event_exposure as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    event_id,
    max(event_name) as event_name,
    min(event_start_date) as event_start_date,
    max(event_month_start_date) as latest_active_month_start_date,
    max(severity_weight) as event_severity
  from active_reporter_event_month
  group by 1, 2
),
reporter_event_history as (
  select
    rm.reporter_iso3,
    rm.period,
    rm.year_month,
    count(distinct ree.event_id) as historical_event_count,
    coalesce(avg(ree.event_severity), 0) as avg_event_severity,
    coalesce(max(ree.event_severity), 0) as max_event_severity,
    max(ree.event_start_date) as most_recent_event_date
  from reporter_month as rm
  left join reporter_event_exposure as ree
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = ree.reporter_iso3
   and ree.event_start_date <= rm.month_start_date
  group by 1, 2, 3
),
import_fact as (
  select
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('reporter_iso3') }} as reporter_iso3,
    {{ canonical_country_iso3('partner_iso3') }} as partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    trade_value_usd
  from {{ ref('fct_reporter_partner_commodity_month') }}
  where lower(trade_flow) like '%import%'
),
supplier_import_month as (
  select
    f.reporter_iso3,
    f.partner_iso3,
    f.period,
    f.year_month,
    sum(f.trade_value_usd) as supplier_import_value_usd
  from import_fact as f
  inner join eligible_reporters as p
    on f.partner_iso3 = p.iso3
  where f.partner_iso3 is not null
    and f.partner_iso3 <> f.reporter_iso3
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4
),
supplier_totals as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    sum(supplier_import_value_usd) as concentration_import_value_usd,
    count(distinct partner_iso3) as import_supplier_count
  from supplier_import_month
  group by 1, 2, 3
),
top_supplier_candidates as (
  select
    sim.reporter_iso3,
    sim.partner_iso3,
    sim.period,
    sim.year_month,
    sim.supplier_import_value_usd,
    st.concentration_import_value_usd,
    st.import_supplier_count,
    {{ safe_divide('sim.supplier_import_value_usd', 'st.concentration_import_value_usd') }} * 100
      as top_supplier_share_pct,
    row_number() over (
      partition by sim.reporter_iso3, sim.period
      order by sim.supplier_import_value_usd desc, sim.partner_iso3
    ) as supplier_rank
  from supplier_import_month as sim
  inner join supplier_totals as st
    on sim.reporter_iso3 = st.reporter_iso3
   and sim.period = st.period
   and sim.year_month = st.year_month
),
top_supplier as (
  select
    tsc.reporter_iso3,
    tsc.period,
    tsc.year_month,
    tsc.partner_iso3 as top_supplier_iso3,
    er.country_name as top_supplier_name,
    tsc.supplier_import_value_usd as top_supplier_import_value_usd,
    tsc.top_supplier_share_pct,
    tsc.top_supplier_share_pct as supplier_concentration_pct,
    tsc.import_supplier_count
  from top_supplier_candidates as tsc
  left join eligible_reporters as er
    on tsc.partner_iso3 = er.iso3
  where tsc.supplier_rank = 1
),
import_commodity_month as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    sum(trade_value_usd) as commodity_import_value_usd
  from import_fact
  where cmd_code is not null
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4
),
top_commodity_candidates as (
  select
    icm.*,
    row_number() over (
      partition by reporter_iso3, period
      order by commodity_import_value_usd desc, cmd_code
    ) as commodity_rank
  from import_commodity_month as icm
),
top_commodity as (
  select
    tcc.reporter_iso3,
    tcc.period,
    tcc.year_month,
    tcc.cmd_code as top_commodity_code,
    co.commodity_name as top_commodity_name,
    co.commodity_group as top_commodity_group,
    tcc.commodity_import_value_usd as top_commodity_import_value_usd
  from top_commodity_candidates as tcc
  left join {{ ref('dim_commodity') }} as co
    on tcc.cmd_code = co.cmd_code
  where tcc.commodity_rank = 1
),
global_bounds as (
  select max(month_start_date) as latest_month_start_date
  from reporter_month
),
assembled as (
  select
    rm.reporter_iso3,
    rm.reporter_name,
    rm.reporter_region,
    rm.reporter_subregion,
    rm.reporter_continent,
    rm.reporter_is_eu,
    rm.reporter_is_oecd,
    rm.period,
    rm.year_month,
    rm.month_start_date,
    rm.month_label,
    rm.year,
    rm.month,
    rm.quarter,
    rm.total_trade_value_usd,
    rm.total_import_value_usd,
    rm.total_export_value_usd,
    ep.energy_import_pct,
    ep.renewable_share_pct,
    ep.fossil_share_pct,
    ep.oil_electricity_share_pct,
    ep.gas_electricity_share_pct,
    ep.coal_electricity_share_pct,
    coalesce(cem.chokepoint_exposure_pct, 0) as chokepoint_exposure_pct,
    coalesce(cem.chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd, 0) as chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd,
    coalesce(cem.exposed_chokepoint_count, 0) as exposed_chokepoint_count,
    coalesce(cem.exposed_route_pair_count, 0) as exposed_route_pair_count,
    coalesce(cem.event_impacted_exposed_chokepoint_count, 0) as event_impacted_exposed_chokepoint_count,
    cem.max_exposed_chokepoint_stress_index_weighted,
    cem.trade_value_weighted_stress_index_weighted,
    tc.top_exposed_chokepoint_id,
    tc.top_exposed_chokepoint_name,
    tc.top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    tc.top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_share_pct,
    coalesce(reh.historical_event_count, 0) as historical_event_count,
    coalesce(reh.avg_event_severity, 0) as avg_event_severity,
    coalesce(reh.max_event_severity, 0) as max_event_severity,
    reh.most_recent_event_date,
    ts.top_supplier_iso3,
    ts.top_supplier_name,
    ts.top_supplier_import_value_usd,
    ts.top_supplier_share_pct,
    ts.supplier_concentration_pct,
    ts.import_supplier_count,
    tcom.top_commodity_code,
    tcom.top_commodity_name,
    tcom.top_commodity_group,
    tcom.top_commodity_import_value_usd,
    {{ safe_divide('tcom.top_commodity_import_value_usd', 'rm.total_import_value_usd') }} * 100
      as top_commodity_import_share_pct,
    case when ep.reporter_iso3 is not null then true else false end as energy_profile_available_flag,
    case when cem.reporter_iso3 is not null then true else false end as chokepoint_exposure_available_flag,
    case when ts.reporter_iso3 is not null then true else false end as supplier_concentration_available_flag,
    case when coalesce(reh.historical_event_count, 0) > 0 then true else false end as event_history_available_flag,
    case when rm.month_start_date = gb.latest_month_start_date then true else false end as latest_month_flag
  from reporter_month as rm
  left join energy_profile as ep
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = ep.reporter_iso3
   and rm.year = ep.year
  left join chokepoint_exposure_month as cem
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = cem.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = cem.period
   and rm.year_month = cem.year_month
  left join top_chokepoint as tc
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = tc.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = tc.period
   and rm.year_month = tc.year_month
  left join reporter_event_history as reh
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = reh.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = reh.period
   and rm.year_month = reh.year_month
  left join top_supplier as ts
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = ts.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = ts.period
   and rm.year_month = ts.year_month
  left join top_commodity as tcom
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = tcom.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = tcom.period
   and rm.year_month = tcom.year_month
  cross join global_bounds as gb
),
risk_components as (
  select
    *,
    greatest(least(coalesce(energy_import_pct, 0), 100), 0) as energy_import_risk_component_pct,
    greatest(least(coalesce(chokepoint_exposure_pct, 0), 100), 0) as chokepoint_exposure_risk_component_pct,
    greatest(100 - least(greatest(coalesce(renewable_share_pct, 0), 0), 100), 0) as renewable_gap_pct,
    greatest(least(coalesce(fossil_share_pct, 0), 100), 0) as fossil_dependence_component_pct,
    greatest(least(coalesce(supplier_concentration_pct, 0), 100), 0) as supplier_concentration_component_pct,
    least(coalesce(historical_event_count, 0) * 10, 100) as historical_event_component_pct
  from assembled
),
scored as (
  select
    *,
    round(
      energy_import_risk_component_pct * 0.30
      + chokepoint_exposure_risk_component_pct * 0.30
      + renewable_gap_pct * 0.15
      + fossil_dependence_component_pct * 0.10
      + supplier_concentration_component_pct * 0.10
      + historical_event_component_pct * 0.05,
      2
    ) as structural_risk_score
  from risk_components
),
banded as (
  select
    *,
    case
      when structural_risk_score >= 75 then 'Critical'
      when structural_risk_score >= 55 then 'High'
      when structural_risk_score >= 35 then 'Medium'
      else 'Lower'
    end as risk_band,
    case
      when energy_profile_available_flag and chokepoint_exposure_available_flag and supplier_concentration_available_flag
        then 'complete_core_inputs'
      when not energy_profile_available_flag then 'missing_energy_profile'
      when not chokepoint_exposure_available_flag then 'missing_chokepoint_exposure'
      when not supplier_concentration_available_flag then 'missing_supplier_concentration'
      else 'partial_inputs'
    end as structural_vulnerability_input_status
  from scored
),
ranked as (
  select
    *,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by structural_risk_score desc, total_trade_value_usd desc, reporter_name
    ) as structural_risk_rank_in_month,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by
        case when energy_import_pct is null then 1 else 0 end,
        energy_import_pct desc,
        total_trade_value_usd desc,
        reporter_name
    ) as energy_import_rank_in_month,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by chokepoint_exposure_pct desc, total_trade_value_usd desc, reporter_name
    ) as chokepoint_exposure_rank_in_month,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by
        case when renewable_share_pct is null then 1 else 0 end,
        renewable_share_pct asc,
        total_trade_value_usd desc,
        reporter_name
    ) as low_renewable_share_rank_in_month,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by
        case when supplier_concentration_pct is null then 1 else 0 end,
        supplier_concentration_pct desc,
        total_trade_value_usd desc,
        reporter_name
    ) as supplier_concentration_rank_in_month
  from banded
)

select
  reporter_iso3,
  reporter_name,
  reporter_region,
  reporter_subregion,
  reporter_continent,
  reporter_is_eu,
  reporter_is_oecd,
  period,
  year_month,
  month_start_date,
  month_label,
  year,
  month,
  quarter,
  total_trade_value_usd,
  total_import_value_usd,
  total_export_value_usd,
  energy_import_pct,
  renewable_share_pct,
  fossil_share_pct,
  oil_electricity_share_pct,
  gas_electricity_share_pct,
  coal_electricity_share_pct,
  chokepoint_exposure_pct,
  chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd,
  exposed_chokepoint_count,
  exposed_route_pair_count,
  event_impacted_exposed_chokepoint_count,
  max_exposed_chokepoint_stress_index_weighted,
  trade_value_weighted_stress_index_weighted,
  top_exposed_chokepoint_id,
  top_exposed_chokepoint_name,
  top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
  top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_share_pct,
  historical_event_count,
  avg_event_severity,
  max_event_severity,
  most_recent_event_date,
  top_supplier_iso3,
  top_supplier_name,
  top_supplier_import_value_usd,
  top_supplier_share_pct,
  supplier_concentration_pct,
  import_supplier_count,
  top_commodity_code,
  top_commodity_name,
  top_commodity_group,
  top_commodity_import_value_usd,
  top_commodity_import_share_pct,
  energy_import_risk_component_pct,
  chokepoint_exposure_risk_component_pct,
  renewable_gap_pct,
  fossil_dependence_component_pct,
  supplier_concentration_component_pct,
  historical_event_component_pct,
  structural_risk_score,
  risk_band,
  structural_vulnerability_input_status,
  structural_risk_rank_in_month,
  energy_import_rank_in_month,
  chokepoint_exposure_rank_in_month,
  low_renewable_share_rank_in_month,
  supplier_concentration_rank_in_month,
  case when structural_risk_rank_in_month = 1 then true else false end as is_highest_structural_risk_reporter,
  energy_profile_available_flag,
  chokepoint_exposure_available_flag,
  supplier_concentration_available_flag,
  event_history_available_flag,
  latest_month_flag
from ranked

-- Monthly Looker Studio semantic mart for Page 5 Structural Vulnerability.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date + reporter_iso3.

with eligible_reporters as (
  select
    iso3,
    country_name,
    region,
    subregion,
    continent,
    is_eu,
    is_oecd
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`dim_country`
  where is_country_map_eligible
),
reporter_month as (
  select
    case
    when 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(rm.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is null then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(rm.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('NULL', 'N/A', 'NA', 'NONE', 'UNKNOWN', 'UNK', 'NAN') then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(rm.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'ROM' then 'ROU'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(

          r' +',
          ' '
        )

  ) = 'UK' then 'GBR'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(rm.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )

      ''
    )
  ) = 'US' then 'USA'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(rm.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )

    er.country_name as reporter_name,

  group by 1, 2

      when fossil_share_pct_reported is not null and fossil_share_pct_reported <> 0 then fossil_share_pct_reported
      when coalesce(oil_electricity_share_pct, 0)
        + coalesce(gas_electricity_share_pct, 0)
        + coalesce(coal_electricity_share_pct, 0) > 0
