      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'US' then 'USA'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'SA' then 'ZAF'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'CN' then 'CHN'
    else upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  )
  end, period
      order by chokepoint_trade_value_usd desc, chokepoint_name
    ) as exposure_rank
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure`
),
top_chokepoint as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id as top_exposed_chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name as top_exposed_chokepoint_name,
    chokepoint_trade_value_usd as top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    chokepoint_trade_exposure_pct as top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_share_pct
  from top_chokepoint_candidates
  where exposure_rank = 1
),
active_reporter_event_month as (
  select distinct
    case
    when 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is null then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('NULL', 'N/A', 'NA', 'NONE', 'UNKNOWN', 'UNK', 'NAN') then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'ROM' then 'ROU'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'UK' then 'GBR'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'US' then 'USA'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'SA' then 'ZAF'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'CN' then 'CHN'
    else upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  )
  end as reporter_iso3,
    cb.event_id,
    cb.event_name,
    cb.month_start_date as event_month_start_date,
    de.event_start_date,
    cb.severity_weight
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure` as e
  inner join `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_chokepoint_bridge` as cb
    on e.year_month = cb.year_month
   and e.chokepoint_name = cb.chokepoint_name
  left join `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_analytics_marts`.`dim_event` as de
    on cb.event_id = de.event_id
  where cb.is_event_active
),
reporter_event_exposure as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    event_id,
    max(event_name) as event_name,
    min(event_start_date) as event_start_date,
    max(event_month_start_date) as latest_active_month_start_date,
    max(severity_weight) as event_severity
  from active_reporter_event_month
  group by 1, 2
),
reporter_event_history as (
  select
    rm.reporter_iso3,
    rm.period,
    rm.year_month,
    count(distinct ree.event_id) as historical_event_count,
    coalesce(avg(ree.event_severity), 0) as avg_event_severity,
    coalesce(max(ree.event_severity), 0) as max_event_severity,
    max(ree.event_start_date) as most_recent_event_date
  from reporter_month as rm
  left join reporter_event_exposure as ree
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = ree.reporter_iso3
   and ree.event_start_date <= rm.month_start_date
  group by 1, 2, 3
),
import_fact as (
  select
    case
    when 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is null then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('NULL', 'N/A', 'NA', 'NONE', 'UNKNOWN', 'UNK', 'NAN') then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'ROM' then 'ROU'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'UK' then 'GBR'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'US' then 'USA'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'SA' then 'ZAF'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'CN' then 'CHN'
    else upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  )
  end as reporter_iso3,
    case
    when 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
   is null then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) in ('NULL', 'N/A', 'NA', 'NONE', 'UNKNOWN', 'UNK', 'NAN') then null
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'ROM' then 'ROU'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'UK' then 'GBR'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'US' then 'USA'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'SA' then 'ZAF'
    when upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) = 'CN' then 'CHN'
    else upper(
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(partner_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',
          ' '
        )
      ),
      ''
    )
  )
  end as partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    trade_value_usd
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`fct_reporter_partner_commodity_month`
  where lower(trade_flow) like '%import%'
),
supplier_import_month as (
  select
    f.reporter_iso3,
    f.partner_iso3,
    f.period,
    f.year_month,
    sum(f.trade_value_usd) as supplier_import_value_usd
  from import_fact as f
  inner join eligible_reporters as p
    on f.partner_iso3 = p.iso3
  where f.partner_iso3 is not null
    and f.partner_iso3 <> f.reporter_iso3
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4
),
supplier_totals as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    sum(supplier_import_value_usd) as concentration_import_value_usd,
    count(distinct partner_iso3) as import_supplier_count
  from supplier_import_month
  group by 1, 2, 3
),
top_supplier_candidates as (
  select
    sim.reporter_iso3,
    sim.partner_iso3,
    sim.period,
    sim.year_month,
    sim.supplier_import_value_usd,
    st.concentration_import_value_usd,
    st.import_supplier_count,
    case
    when st.concentration_import_value_usd is null or st.concentration_import_value_usd = 0 then null
    else (sim.supplier_import_value_usd) / (st.concentration_import_value_usd)
  end * 100
      as top_supplier_share_pct,
    row_number() over (
      partition by sim.reporter_iso3, sim.period
      order by sim.supplier_import_value_usd desc, sim.partner_iso3
    ) as supplier_rank
  from supplier_import_month as sim
  inner join supplier_totals as st
    on sim.reporter_iso3 = st.reporter_iso3
   and sim.period = st.period
   and sim.year_month = st.year_month
),
top_supplier as (
  select
    tsc.reporter_iso3,
    tsc.period,
    tsc.year_month,
    tsc.partner_iso3 as top_supplier_iso3,
    er.country_name as top_supplier_name,
    tsc.supplier_import_value_usd as top_supplier_import_value_usd,
    tsc.top_supplier_share_pct,
    tsc.top_supplier_share_pct as supplier_concentration_pct,
    tsc.import_supplier_count
  from top_supplier_candidates as tsc
  left join eligible_reporters as er
    on tsc.partner_iso3 = er.iso3
  where tsc.supplier_rank = 1
),
import_commodity_month as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    sum(trade_value_usd) as commodity_import_value_usd
  from import_fact
  where cmd_code is not null
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4
),
top_commodity_candidates as (
  select
    icm.*,
    row_number() over (
      partition by reporter_iso3, period
      order by commodity_import_value_usd desc, cmd_code
    ) as commodity_rank
  from import_commodity_month as icm
),
top_commodity as (
  select
    tcc.reporter_iso3,
    tcc.period,
    tcc.year_month,
    tcc.cmd_code as top_commodity_code,
    co.commodity_name as top_commodity_name,
    co.commodity_group as top_commodity_group,
    tcc.commodity_import_value_usd as top_commodity_import_value_usd
  from top_commodity_candidates as tcc
  left join `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`dim_commodity` as co
    on tcc.cmd_code = co.cmd_code
  where tcc.commodity_rank = 1
),
global_bounds as (
  select max(month_start_date) as latest_month_start_date
  from reporter_month
),
assembled as (
  select
    rm.reporter_iso3,
    rm.reporter_name,
    rm.reporter_region,
    rm.reporter_subregion,
    rm.reporter_continent,
    rm.reporter_is_eu,
    rm.reporter_is_oecd,
    rm.period,
    rm.year_month,
    rm.month_start_date,
    rm.month_label,
    rm.year,
    rm.month,
    rm.quarter,
    rm.total_trade_value_usd,
    rm.total_import_value_usd,
    rm.total_export_value_usd,
    ep.energy_import_pct,
    ep.renewable_share_pct,
    ep.fossil_share_pct,
    ep.oil_electricity_share_pct,
    ep.gas_electricity_share_pct,
    ep.coal_electricity_share_pct,
    coalesce(cem.chokepoint_exposure_pct, 0) as chokepoint_exposure_pct,
    coalesce(cem.chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd, 0) as chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd,
    coalesce(cem.exposed_chokepoint_count, 0) as exposed_chokepoint_count,
    coalesce(cem.exposed_route_pair_count, 0) as exposed_route_pair_count,
    coalesce(cem.event_impacted_exposed_chokepoint_count, 0) as event_impacted_exposed_chokepoint_count,
    cem.max_exposed_chokepoint_stress_index_weighted,
    cem.trade_value_weighted_stress_index_weighted,
    tc.top_exposed_chokepoint_id,
    tc.top_exposed_chokepoint_name,
    tc.top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    tc.top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_share_pct,
    coalesce(reh.historical_event_count, 0) as historical_event_count,
    coalesce(reh.avg_event_severity, 0) as avg_event_severity,
    coalesce(reh.max_event_severity, 0) as max_event_severity,
    reh.most_recent_event_date,
    ts.top_supplier_iso3,
    ts.top_supplier_name,
    ts.top_supplier_import_value_usd,
    ts.top_supplier_share_pct,
    ts.supplier_concentration_pct,
    ts.import_supplier_count,
    tcom.top_commodity_code,
    tcom.top_commodity_name,
    tcom.top_commodity_group,
    tcom.top_commodity_import_value_usd,
    case
    when rm.total_import_value_usd is null or rm.total_import_value_usd = 0 then null
    else (tcom.top_commodity_import_value_usd) / (rm.total_import_value_usd)
  end * 100
      as top_commodity_import_share_pct,
    case when ep.reporter_iso3 is not null then true else false end as energy_profile_available_flag,
    case when cem.reporter_iso3 is not null then true else false end as chokepoint_exposure_available_flag,
    case when ts.reporter_iso3 is not null then true else false end as supplier_concentration_available_flag,
    case when coalesce(reh.historical_event_count, 0) > 0 then true else false end as event_history_available_flag,
    case when rm.month_start_date = gb.latest_month_start_date then true else false end as latest_month_flag
  from reporter_month as rm
  left join energy_profile as ep
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = ep.reporter_iso3
   and rm.year = ep.year
  left join chokepoint_exposure_month as cem
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = cem.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = cem.period
   and rm.year_month = cem.year_month
  left join top_chokepoint as tc
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = tc.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = tc.period
   and rm.year_month = tc.year_month
  left join reporter_event_history as reh
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = reh.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = reh.period
   and rm.year_month = reh.year_month
  left join top_supplier as ts
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = ts.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = ts.period
   and rm.year_month = ts.year_month
  left join top_commodity as tcom
    on rm.reporter_iso3 = tcom.reporter_iso3
   and rm.period = tcom.period
   and rm.year_month = tcom.year_month
  cross join global_bounds as gb
),
risk_components as (
  select
    *,
    greatest(least(coalesce(energy_import_pct, 0), 100), 0) as energy_import_risk_component_pct,
    greatest(least(coalesce(chokepoint_exposure_pct, 0), 100), 0) as chokepoint_exposure_risk_component_pct,
    greatest(100 - least(greatest(coalesce(renewable_share_pct, 0), 0), 100), 0) as renewable_gap_pct,
    greatest(least(coalesce(fossil_share_pct, 0), 100), 0) as fossil_dependence_component_pct,
    greatest(least(coalesce(supplier_concentration_pct, 0), 100), 0) as supplier_concentration_component_pct,
    least(coalesce(historical_event_count, 0) * 10, 100) as historical_event_component_pct
  from assembled
),
scored as (
  select
    *,
    round(
      energy_import_risk_component_pct * 0.30
      + chokepoint_exposure_risk_component_pct * 0.30
      + renewable_gap_pct * 0.15
      + fossil_dependence_component_pct * 0.10
      + supplier_concentration_component_pct * 0.10
      + historical_event_component_pct * 0.05,
      2
    ) as structural_risk_score
  from risk_components
),
banded as (
  select
    *,
    case
      when structural_risk_score >= 75 then 'Critical'
      when structural_risk_score >= 55 then 'High'
      when structural_risk_score >= 35 then 'Medium'
      else 'Lower'
    end as risk_band,
    case
      when energy_profile_available_flag and chokepoint_exposure_available_flag and supplier_concentration_available_flag
        then 'complete_core_inputs'
      when not energy_profile_available_flag then 'missing_energy_profile'
      when not chokepoint_exposure_available_flag then 'missing_chokepoint_exposure'
      when not supplier_concentration_available_flag then 'missing_supplier_concentration'
      else 'partial_inputs'
    end as structural_vulnerability_input_status
  from scored
),
ranked as (
  select
    *,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by structural_risk_score desc, total_trade_value_usd desc, reporter_name
    ) as structural_risk_rank_in_month,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by
        case when energy_import_pct is null then 1 else 0 end,
        energy_import_pct desc,
        total_trade_value_usd desc,
        reporter_name
    ) as energy_import_rank_in_month,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by chokepoint_exposure_pct desc, total_trade_value_usd desc, reporter_name
    ) as chokepoint_exposure_rank_in_month,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by
        case when renewable_share_pct is null then 1 else 0 end,
        renewable_share_pct asc,
        total_trade_value_usd desc,
        reporter_name
    ) as low_renewable_share_rank_in_month,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by
        case when supplier_concentration_pct is null then 1 else 0 end,
        supplier_concentration_pct desc,
        total_trade_value_usd desc,
        reporter_name
    ) as supplier_concentration_rank_in_month
  from banded
)

select
  reporter_iso3,
  reporter_name,
  reporter_region,
  reporter_subregion,
  reporter_continent,
  reporter_is_eu,
  reporter_is_oecd,
  period,
  year_month,
  month_start_date,
  month_label,
  year,
  month,
  quarter,
  total_trade_value_usd,
  total_import_value_usd,
  total_export_value_usd,
  energy_import_pct,
  renewable_share_pct,
  fossil_share_pct,
  oil_electricity_share_pct,
  gas_electricity_share_pct,
  coal_electricity_share_pct,
  chokepoint_exposure_pct,
  chokepoint_exposed_trade_value_usd,
  exposed_chokepoint_count,
  exposed_route_pair_count,
  event_impacted_exposed_chokepoint_count,
  max_exposed_chokepoint_stress_index_weighted,
  trade_value_weighted_stress_index_weighted,
  top_exposed_chokepoint_id,
  top_exposed_chokepoint_name,
  top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
  top_exposed_chokepoint_trade_share_pct,
  historical_event_count,
  avg_event_severity,
  max_event_severity,
  most_recent_event_date,
  top_supplier_iso3,
  top_supplier_name,
  top_supplier_import_value_usd,
  top_supplier_share_pct,
  supplier_concentration_pct,
  import_supplier_count,
  top_commodity_code,
  top_commodity_name,
  top_commodity_group,
  top_commodity_import_value_usd,
  top_commodity_import_share_pct,
  energy_import_risk_component_pct,
  chokepoint_exposure_risk_component_pct,
  renewable_gap_pct,
  fossil_dependence_component_pct,
  supplier_concentration_component_pct,
  historical_event_component_pct,
  structural_risk_score,
  risk_band,
  structural_vulnerability_input_status,
  structural_risk_rank_in_month,
  energy_import_rank_in_month,
  chokepoint_exposure_rank_in_month,
  low_renewable_share_rank_in_month,
  supplier_concentration_rank_in_month,
  case when structural_risk_rank_in_month = 1 then true else false end as is_highest_structural_risk_reporter,
  energy_profile_available_flag,
  chokepoint_exposure_available_flag,
  supplier_concentration_available_flag,
  event_history_available_flag,
  latest_month_flag

model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_m.name: mart_chokepoint_monthly_hotspot_map
model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_m.description: One-row-per-chokepoint semantic mart for the supporting Page 4 point map, combining each chokepoint's latest available stress snapshot, display-safe stress labels, aggregated exposure counts, latitude/longitude, and geography point.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First calendar day of the chokepoint's selected latest available stress snapshot.

chokepoint_id.name: chokepoint_id
chokepoint_id.description: Canonical chokepoint identifier used for joins and filters.

chokepoint_name.name: chokepoint_name
chokepoint_name.description: Standardized chokepoint name shown in point-map labels and tooltips.

longitude.name: longitude
longitude.description: Chokepoint longitude in decimal degrees for Looker Studio point maps.

latitude.name: latitude
latitude.description: Chokepoint latitude in decimal degrees for Looker Studio point maps.

geo_point.name: geo_point
geo_point.description: BigQuery GEOGRAPHY point built with ST_GEOGPOINT(longitude, latitude), retained beside numeric coordinates for future GIS usage.

has_map_coordinates_flag.name: has_map_coordinates_flag
has_map_coordinates_flag.description: True when the chokepoint has usable latitude and longitude for point-map rendering.

stress_deviation_score_capped.name: stress_deviation_score_capped
stress_deviation_score_capped.description: Display-oriented capped deviation score recommended for point size or color intensity.

stress_deviation_index_100.name: stress_deviation_index_100
stress_deviation_index_100.description: Executive-friendly 0 to 100 stress scale recommended for color legends or tooltips.

stress_severity_band.name: stress_severity_band
stress_severity_band.description: Display-oriented severity label for the chokepoint-month.

event_active_flag.name: event_active_flag
event_active_flag.description: True when one or more active events are linked to the chokepoint in the month.

total_exposed_trade_value_usd.name: total_exposed_trade_value_usd
total_exposed_trade_value_usd.description: Total global trade value in USD exposed to the chokepoint in the month across all reporters.

high_medium_exposed_trade_value_usd.name: high_medium_exposed_trade_value_usd
high_medium_exposed_trade_value_usd.description: Total global exposed trade value in USD limited to HIGH and MEDIUM route-confidence rows.

exposed_reporter_count.name: exposed_reporter_count
exposed_reporter_count.description: Count of distinct reporting countries exposed to the chokepoint in the month.

high_medium_exposed_reporter_count.name: high_medium_exposed_reporter_count
high_medium_exposed_reporter_count.description: Count of distinct reporting countries exposed through HIGH and MEDIUM route-confidence rows.

top_exposed_reporter_iso3.name: top_exposed_reporter_iso3
top_exposed_reporter_iso3.description: ISO3 code of the reporting country with the highest exposed trade value on the chokepoint-month.

top_exposed_reporter_country_name.name: top_exposed_reporter_country_name
top_exposed_reporter_country_name.description: Country name of the reporting country with the highest exposed trade value on the chokepoint-month.

latest_month_flag.name: latest_month_flag
latest_month_flag.description: True for the selected latest available chokepoint snapshot exposed by this one-row-per-chokepoint map-support mart.

model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_m.raw_code:
-- Looker Studio support mart for the Page 4 chokepoint point map.
-- Grain: one row per chokepoint_id, using the chokepoint's latest available stress month.

with stress_base as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    z_score_historical,
    abs_z_score_historical,
    z_score_historical_capped,
    stress_deviation_score_capped,
    stress_deviation_index_100,
    stress_index,
    stress_index_weighted,
    stress_severity_band,
    latest_month_flag,
    event_active_flag,
    active_event_count
  from {{ ref('mart_chokepoint_monthly_stress_detail') }}
),
eligible_reporters as (
  select
    iso3,
    country_name
  from {{ ref('dim_country') }}
  where is_country_map_eligible
),
exposure_base as (
  select
    e.month_start_date,
    e.year_month,
    e.chokepoint_id,
    e.chokepoint_name,
    er.iso3 as reporter_iso3,
    er.country_name as reporter_country_name,
    e.chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    e.chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio,
    e.route_pair_count
  from {{ ref('mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure') }} as e
  inner join eligible_reporters as er
    on {{ canonical_country_iso3('e.reporter_iso3') }} = er.iso3
),
exposure_aggregated as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    sum(chokepoint_trade_value_usd) as total_exposed_trade_value_usd,
    count(distinct reporter_iso3) as exposed_reporter_count,
    sum(route_pair_count) as exposed_route_pair_count,
    avg(chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio) as avg_reporter_exposure_ratio,
    max(chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio) as max_reporter_exposure_ratio
  from exposure_base
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4
),
high_medium_exposure as (
  select
    te.year_month,
    te.chokepoint_id,
    sum(te.chokepoint_trade_value_usd) as high_medium_exposed_trade_value_usd,
    count(distinct er.iso3) as high_medium_exposed_reporter_count
  from {{ ref('mart_trade_exposure') }} as te
  inner join eligible_reporters as er
    on {{ canonical_country_iso3('te.reporter_iso3') }} = er.iso3
  where te.route_confidence_score in ('HIGH', 'MEDIUM')
  group by 1, 2
),
top_reporter_candidates as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    reporter_iso3,
    reporter_country_name,
    chokepoint_trade_value_usd,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date, chokepoint_id
      order by
        chokepoint_trade_value_usd desc,
        reporter_country_name
    ) as exposure_rank_in_chokepoint_month
  from exposure_base
),
top_reporter as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    reporter_iso3 as top_exposed_reporter_iso3,
    reporter_country_name as top_exposed_reporter_country_name,
    chokepoint_trade_value_usd as top_exposed_reporter_trade_value_usd
  from top_reporter_candidates
  where exposure_rank_in_chokepoint_month = 1
),
hotspot_snapshot as (
  select
    sb.month_start_date,
    sb.year_month,
    format_date('%b %Y', sb.month_start_date) as month_label,
    sb.chokepoint_id,
    sb.chokepoint_name,
    dc.chokepoint_kind,
    dc.longitude,
    dc.latitude,
    dc.geo_point,
    case
      when dc.longitude is not null and dc.latitude is not null then true
      else false
    end as has_map_coordinates_flag,
    sb.z_score_historical,
    sb.abs_z_score_historical,
    sb.z_score_historical_capped,
    sb.stress_deviation_score_capped,
    sb.stress_deviation_index_100,
    sb.stress_index,
    sb.stress_index_weighted,
    sb.stress_severity_band,
    sb.event_active_flag,
    sb.active_event_count,
    coalesce(ea.total_exposed_trade_value_usd, 0) as total_exposed_trade_value_usd,
    coalesce(hm.high_medium_exposed_trade_value_usd, 0) as high_medium_exposed_trade_value_usd,
    coalesce(ea.exposed_reporter_count, 0) as exposed_reporter_count,
    coalesce(hm.high_medium_exposed_reporter_count, 0) as high_medium_exposed_reporter_count,
    coalesce(ea.exposed_route_pair_count, 0) as exposed_route_pair_count,
    ea.avg_reporter_exposure_ratio,
    ea.max_reporter_exposure_ratio,
    tr.top_exposed_reporter_iso3,
    tr.top_exposed_reporter_country_name,
    tr.top_exposed_reporter_trade_value_usd,
    true as latest_month_flag,
    row_number() over (
      partition by sb.chokepoint_id
      order by sb.month_start_date desc, sb.year_month desc
    ) as chokepoint_snapshot_rank
  from stress_base as sb
  left join exposure_aggregated as ea
    on sb.month_start_date = ea.month_start_date
   and sb.chokepoint_id = ea.chokepoint_id
  left join high_medium_exposure as hm
    on sb.year_month = hm.year_month
   and sb.chokepoint_id = hm.chokepoint_id
  left join top_reporter as tr
    on sb.month_start_date = tr.month_start_date
   and sb.chokepoint_id = tr.chokepoint_id
  left join {{ ref('dim_chokepoint') }} as dc
    on sb.chokepoint_id = dc.chokepoint_id
)

select
  month_start_date,
  year_month,
  month_label,
  chokepoint_id,
  chokepoint_name,
  chokepoint_kind,
  longitude,
  latitude,
  geo_point,
  has_map_coordinates_flag,
  z_score_historical,
  abs_z_score_historical,
  z_score_historical_capped,
  stress_deviation_score_capped,
  stress_deviation_index_100,
  stress_index,
  stress_index_weighted,
  stress_severity_band,
  event_active_flag,
  active_event_count,
  total_exposed_trade_value_usd,
  high_medium_exposed_trade_value_usd,
  exposed_reporter_count,
  high_medium_exposed_reporter_count,
  exposed_route_pair_count,
  avg_reporter_exposure_ratio,
  max_reporter_exposure_ratio,
  top_exposed_reporter_iso3,
  top_exposed_reporter_country_name,
  top_exposed_reporter_trade_value_usd,
  latest_month_flag
from hotspot_snapshot
where chokepoint_snapshot_rank = 1

-- Grain: one row per chokepoint_id, using the chokepoint's latest available stress month.

with stress_base as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    z_score_historical,
    abs_z_score_historical,

    stress_deviation_score_capped,

    stress_index,
    stress_index_weighted,
    stress_severity_band,
    latest_month_flag,
    event_active_flag,
    active_event_count
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`mart_chokepoint_monthly_stress_detail`
),
eligible_reporters as (
  select
    iso3,

  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`dim_country`

),
exposure_base as (
  select
    e.month_start_date,

    e.chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio,
    e.route_pair_count
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure` as e
  inner join eligible_reporters as er
    on case
    when 
    nullif(
      trim(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(cast(e.reporter_iso3 as string), r'[\t\r\n]+', ' '),
          r' +',

      ''
    )
   is null then null
    when upper(
    nullif(

model.capstone_monthly.mart_global_daily.name: mart_global_daily_market_signal
model.capstone_monthly.mart_global_daily.description: Daily scorecard semantic mart for Page 2, combining aggregated chokepoint daily signals with daily Brent context at one row per date-day.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.description: Calendar day field used directly in Looker Studio date filters and scorecard trend ranges.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First day of the containing month retained for daily-to-month drill context.

year_month_label.name: year_month_label
year_month_label.description: YYYY-MM display label for daily tables and tooltips.

observed_chokepoint_count.name: observed_chokepoint_count
observed_chokepoint_count.description: Number of chokepoints with observed PortWatch data on the day.

expected_chokepoint_count.name: expected_chokepoint_count
expected_chokepoint_count.description: Number of chokepoints expected in the daily PortWatch scope, repeated on every row for scorecards.

daily_coverage_ratio.name: daily_coverage_ratio
daily_coverage_ratio.description: Share of expected chokepoints with observed PortWatch data on the day, expressed as a 0 to 1 ratio.

daily_source_coverage_status.name: daily_source_coverage_status
daily_source_coverage_status.description: Coverage status band highlighting whether the daily PortWatch feed is complete, partial, or absent for the day.

avg_chokepoint_signal_index.name: avg_chokepoint_signal_index
avg_chokepoint_signal_index.description: Average daily composite signal across observed chokepoints.

avg_abs_chokepoint_signal_index.name: avg_abs_chokepoint_signal_index
avg_abs_chokepoint_signal_index.description: Average absolute daily composite signal across observed chokepoints.

max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index.name: max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index
max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index.description: Maximum absolute daily composite signal across observed chokepoints.

stressed_chokepoint_count.name: stressed_chokepoint_count
stressed_chokepoint_count.description: Count of observed chokepoints with an absolute composite signal of at least one standard deviation.

system_stress_level.name: system_stress_level
system_stress_level.description: Daily system severity band derived from the strongest observed chokepoint signal magnitude.

brent_price_usd.name: brent_price_usd
brent_price_usd.description: Brent benchmark price in USD per barrel on the observed trading day.

brent_price_change_usd_1_observed_day.name: brent_price_change_usd_1_observed_day
brent_price_change_usd_1_observed_day.description: Brent absolute price change versus the prior observed trading day.

brent_return_pct_1_observed_day.name: brent_return_pct_1_observed_day
brent_return_pct_1_observed_day.description: Brent percentage price change versus the prior observed trading day.

brent_price_change_usd_7_observed_days.name: brent_price_change_usd_7_observed_days
brent_price_change_usd_7_observed_days.description: Brent absolute price change versus seven prior observed trading days.

brent_return_pct_7_observed_days.name: brent_return_pct_7_observed_days
brent_return_pct_7_observed_days.description: Brent percentage price change versus seven prior observed trading days.

brent_rolling_mean_7_observed_days.name: brent_rolling_mean_7_observed_days
brent_rolling_mean_7_observed_days.description: Brent average price across the prior seven observed trading days, excluding the current day.

brent_rolling_mean_30_observed_days.name: brent_rolling_mean_30_observed_days
brent_rolling_mean_30_observed_days.description: Brent average price across the prior thirty observed trading days, excluding the current day.

brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days.name: brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days
brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days.description: Brent population standard deviation across the prior thirty observed trading days.

brent_z_score_rolling_30_observed_days.name: brent_z_score_rolling_30_observed_days
brent_z_score_rolling_30_observed_days.description: Brent price deviation from the prior thirty observed trading day baseline, expressed in standard deviations.

has_brent_price_data_flag.name: has_brent_price_data_flag
has_brent_price_data_flag.description: True when Brent has an observed trading-day value on the date.

latest_day_flag.name: latest_day_flag
latest_day_flag.description: True when the row belongs to the latest day with observed PortWatch system data.

model.capstone_monthly.mart_global_daily.raw_code:
-- Daily Looker Studio scorecard mart for Page 2.
-- Grain: one row per date_day.

with portwatch_daily as (
  select
    date_day,
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    chokepoint_id,
    has_portwatch_daily_data_flag,
    signal_index_rolling_30d
  from {{ ref('mart_chokepoint_daily_signal') }}
),
expected_chokepoints as (
  select count(distinct chokepoint_id) as expected_chokepoint_count
  from portwatch_daily
),
portwatch_agg as (
  select
    date_day,
    max(month_start_date) as month_start_date,
    max(year_month) as year_month_label,
    sum(case when has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as observed_chokepoint_count,
    avg(case when has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 1 then signal_index_rolling_30d end) as avg_chokepoint_signal_index,
    avg(case when has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 1 then abs(signal_index_rolling_30d) end) as avg_abs_chokepoint_signal_index,
    max(case when has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 1 then abs(signal_index_rolling_30d) end) as max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index,
    sum(
      case
        when has_portwatch_daily_data_flag = 1
          and signal_index_rolling_30d is not null
          and abs(signal_index_rolling_30d) >= 1 then 1
        else 0
      end
    ) as stressed_chokepoint_count
  from portwatch_daily
  group by 1
),
brent_base as (
  select
    date_day,
    price_usd_per_bbl as brent_price_usd
  from {{ ref('stg_brent_daily') }}
  where benchmark_code = 'BRENT_EU'
),
brent_features as (
  select
    date_day,
    brent_price_usd,
    lag(brent_price_usd, 1) over (
      order by date_day
    ) as brent_price_usd_1_observed_day_ago,
    lag(brent_price_usd, 7) over (
      order by date_day
    ) as brent_price_usd_7_observed_days_ago,
    avg(brent_price_usd) over trailing_7d as brent_rolling_mean_7_observed_days,
    avg(brent_price_usd) over trailing_30d as brent_rolling_mean_30_observed_days,
    stddev_pop(brent_price_usd) over trailing_30d as brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days
  from brent_base
  window
    trailing_7d as (
      order by date_day
      rows between 7 preceding and 1 preceding
    ),
    trailing_30d as (
      order by date_day
      rows between 30 preceding and 1 preceding
    )
),
joined as (
  select
    p.date_day,
    p.month_start_date,
    p.year_month_label,
    p.observed_chokepoint_count,
    ec.expected_chokepoint_count,
    {{ safe_divide('p.observed_chokepoint_count', 'ec.expected_chokepoint_count') }} as daily_coverage_ratio,
    p.avg_chokepoint_signal_index,
    p.avg_abs_chokepoint_signal_index,
    p.max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index,
    p.stressed_chokepoint_count,
    b.brent_price_usd,
    case
      when b.brent_price_usd is null or b.brent_price_usd_1_observed_day_ago is null then null
      else b.brent_price_usd - b.brent_price_usd_1_observed_day_ago
    end as brent_price_change_usd_1_observed_day,
    case
      when b.brent_price_usd is null
        or b.brent_price_usd_1_observed_day_ago is null
        or b.brent_price_usd_1_observed_day_ago = 0 then null
      else (b.brent_price_usd - b.brent_price_usd_1_observed_day_ago) / b.brent_price_usd_1_observed_day_ago
    end as brent_return_pct_1_observed_day,
    case
      when b.brent_price_usd is null or b.brent_price_usd_7_observed_days_ago is null then null
      else b.brent_price_usd - b.brent_price_usd_7_observed_days_ago
    end as brent_price_change_usd_7_observed_days,
    case
      when b.brent_price_usd is null
        or b.brent_price_usd_7_observed_days_ago is null
        or b.brent_price_usd_7_observed_days_ago = 0 then null
      else (b.brent_price_usd - b.brent_price_usd_7_observed_days_ago) / b.brent_price_usd_7_observed_days_ago
    end as brent_return_pct_7_observed_days,
    b.brent_rolling_mean_7_observed_days,
    b.brent_rolling_mean_30_observed_days,
    b.brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days,
    case
      when b.brent_price_usd is null
        or b.brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days is null
        or b.brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days = 0 then null
      else (b.brent_price_usd - b.brent_rolling_mean_30_observed_days) / b.brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days
    end as brent_z_score_rolling_30_observed_days,
    case when b.brent_price_usd is not null then true else false end as has_brent_price_data_flag
  from portwatch_agg as p
  cross join expected_chokepoints as ec
  left join brent_features as b
    on p.date_day = b.date_day
),
latest_portwatch_day as (
  select max(date_day) as latest_date_day
  from portwatch_agg
  where observed_chokepoint_count > 0
)

select
  j.date_day,
  j.month_start_date,
  j.year_month_label,
  j.observed_chokepoint_count,
  j.expected_chokepoint_count,
  j.daily_coverage_ratio,
  case
    when j.observed_chokepoint_count = 0 then 'NO_PORTWATCH_DATA'
    when j.observed_chokepoint_count = j.expected_chokepoint_count then 'FULL_COVERAGE'
    else 'PARTIAL_COVERAGE'
  end as daily_source_coverage_status,
  j.avg_chokepoint_signal_index,
  j.avg_abs_chokepoint_signal_index,
  j.max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index,
  j.stressed_chokepoint_count,
  case
    when j.observed_chokepoint_count = 0 then 'NO_PORTWATCH_DATA'
    when j.max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index is null then 'INSUFFICIENT_BASELINE'
    when j.max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index >= 2 then 'SEVERE'
    when j.max_abs_chokepoint_signal_index >= 1 then 'ELEVATED'
    else 'NORMAL'
  end as system_stress_level,
  j.brent_price_usd,
  j.brent_price_change_usd_1_observed_day,
  j.brent_return_pct_1_observed_day,
  j.brent_price_change_usd_7_observed_days,
  j.brent_return_pct_7_observed_days,
  j.brent_rolling_mean_7_observed_days,
  j.brent_rolling_mean_30_observed_days,
  j.brent_rolling_stddev_30_observed_days,
  j.brent_z_score_rolling_30_observed_days,
  j.has_brent_price_data_flag,
  case when j.date_day = l.latest_date_day then true else false end as latest_day_flag
from joined as j
cross join latest_portwatch_day as l

model.capstone_monthly.mart_trade_month_.name: mart_trade_month_coverage_status
model.capstone_monthly.mart_trade_month_.description: Monthly support mart for Page 1 executive trade completeness framing, collapsing the repeated month-level coverage fields from the reporter-month trade overview mart into one row per month.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First calendar day of the month used directly in Looker Studio month filters and trend charts.

year_month_key.name: year_month_key
year_month_key.description: Integer month key in YYYYMM format for sorting and joins.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.description: Canonical month key in YYYY-MM format.

month_label.name: month_label
month_label.description: Business-readable month label for scorecards and tooltips.

reporters_with_data_in_month.name: reporters_with_data_in_month
reporters_with_data_in_month.description: Count of reporters with a canonical upstream trade row in the month.

expected_reporter_count.name: expected_reporter_count
expected_reporter_count.description: Count of expected reporters in scope for the month.

missing_reporter_count.name: missing_reporter_count
missing_reporter_count.description: Count of expected reporters that do not have a canonical upstream trade row in the month.

missing_reporter_pct.name: missing_reporter_pct
missing_reporter_pct.description: Share of expected reporters missing trade data in the month, expressed as a 0 to 1 ratio.

reporting_completeness_pct.name: reporting_completeness_pct
reporting_completeness_pct.description: Share of expected reporters that have trade data in the month, expressed as a 0 to 1 ratio.

coverage_gap_flag.name: coverage_gap_flag
coverage_gap_flag.description: True when one or more expected reporters are missing trade data in the month.

trade_reporting_status.name: trade_reporting_status
trade_reporting_status.description: Coverage status band describing whether the month is fully reported, partially reported, or has no trade rows at all.

complete_month_flag.name: complete_month_flag
complete_month_flag.description: True when all expected reporters have trade data in the month.

latest_complete_month_flag.name: latest_complete_month_flag
latest_complete_month_flag.description: True when the row belongs to the most recent month with complete reporter coverage.

latest_month_flag.name: latest_month_flag
latest_month_flag.description: True when the row belongs to the latest available trade month in the source mart.

latest_complete_month_start_date.name: latest_complete_month_start_date
latest_complete_month_start_date.description: Most recent month_start_date where all expected reporters had trade data, repeated on every row for executive scorecards.

latest_complete_year_month.name: latest_complete_year_month
latest_complete_year_month.description: Canonical YYYY-MM label for the most recent complete trade month, repeated on every row for executive scorecards.

months_between_latest_and_latest_complet.name: months_between_latest_and_latest_complete
months_between_latest_and_latest_complet.description: Number of calendar months between the latest trade month and the latest complete trade month.

model.capstone_monthly.mart_trade_month_.raw_code:
-- Monthly Looker Studio support mart for Page 1 trade coverage framing.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date.

with overview as (
  select
    reporter_country_code,
    year_month_key,
    year_month,
    month_start_date,
    month_label,
    has_reported_trade_data_flag,
    reporters_with_data_in_month,
    expected_reporter_count,
    reporting_completeness_pct,
    complete_month_flag,
    latest_complete_month_flag,
    latest_month_flag
  from {{ ref('mart_dashboard_global_trade_overview') }}
),
month_rollup as (
  -- The source mart already repeats month-level coverage fields on every reporter row.
  -- This rollup collapses those repeated fields to a month-grain semantic source.
  select
    month_start_date,
    max(year_month_key) as year_month_key,
    max(year_month) as year_month,
    max(month_label) as month_label,
    max(reporters_with_data_in_month) as reporters_with_data_in_month,
    max(expected_reporter_count) as expected_reporter_count,
    countif(not has_reported_trade_data_flag) as missing_reporter_count,
    max(reporting_completeness_pct) as reporting_completeness_pct,
    max(complete_month_flag) as complete_month_flag,
    max(latest_complete_month_flag) as latest_complete_month_flag,
    max(latest_month_flag) as latest_month_flag
  from overview
  group by 1
),
latest_month as (
  select max(month_start_date) as latest_month_start_date
  from month_rollup
),
latest_complete_month as (
  select max(case when complete_month_flag then month_start_date end) as latest_complete_month_start_date
  from month_rollup
)

select
  mr.month_start_date,
  mr.year_month_key,
  mr.year_month,
  mr.month_label,
  mr.reporters_with_data_in_month,
  mr.expected_reporter_count,
  mr.missing_reporter_count,
  {{ safe_divide('mr.missing_reporter_count', 'mr.expected_reporter_count') }} as missing_reporter_pct,
  mr.reporting_completeness_pct,
  case
    when mr.missing_reporter_count > 0 then true
    else false
  end as coverage_gap_flag,
  case
    when mr.reporters_with_data_in_month = 0 then 'NO_TRADE_DATA'
    when mr.complete_month_flag then 'FULL_COVERAGE'
    else 'PARTIAL_COVERAGE'
  end as trade_reporting_status,
  mr.complete_month_flag,
  mr.latest_complete_month_flag,
  mr.latest_month_flag,
  lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date,
  {{ year_month_from_date('lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date') }} as latest_complete_year_month,
  case
    when lm.latest_month_start_date is null
      or lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date is null then null
    else cast(
      (
        extract(year from lm.latest_month_start_date) - extract(year from lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date)
      ) * 12
      + (
        extract(month from lm.latest_month_start_date) - extract(month from lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date)
      ) as {{ dbt.type_int() }}
    )
  end as months_between_latest_and_latest_complete
from month_rollup as mr
cross join latest_month as lm
cross join latest_complete_month as lcm
model.capstone_monthly.mart_trade_month_.compiled_code:
-- Monthly Looker Studio support mart for Page 1 trade coverage framing.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date.

with overview as (
  select
    reporter_country_code,
    year_month_key,

    latest_complete_month_flag,
    latest_month_flag
  from `global-insights-capstone`.`analytics_marts`.`mart_dashboard_global_trade_overview`
),
month_rollup as (
  -- The source mart already repeats month-level coverage fields on every reporter row.
  -- This rollup collapses those repeated fields to a month-grain semantic source.
  select
    month_start_date,
    max(year_month_key) as year_month_key,
    max(year_month) as year_month,
    max(month_label) as month_label,
    max(reporters_with_data_in_month) as reporters_with_data_in_month,
    max(expected_reporter_count) as expected_reporter_count,
    countif(not has_reported_trade_data_flag) as missing_reporter_count,
    max(reporting_completeness_pct) as reporting_completeness_pct,
    max(complete_month_flag) as complete_month_flag,
    max(latest_complete_month_flag) as latest_complete_month_flag,
    max(latest_month_flag) as latest_month_flag
  from overview
  group by 1
),
latest_month as (
  select max(month_start_date) as latest_month_start_date
  from month_rollup
),
latest_complete_month as (
  select max(case when complete_month_flag then month_start_date end) as latest_complete_month_start_date
  from month_rollup
)

select
  mr.month_start_date,
  mr.year_month_key,
  mr.year_month,
  mr.month_label,
  mr.reporters_with_data_in_month,
  mr.expected_reporter_count,
  mr.missing_reporter_count,
  case
    when mr.expected_reporter_count is null or mr.expected_reporter_count = 0 then null
    else (mr.missing_reporter_count) / (mr.expected_reporter_count)
  end as missing_reporter_pct,
  mr.reporting_completeness_pct,
  case
    when mr.missing_reporter_count > 0 then true
    else false
  end as coverage_gap_flag,
  case
    when mr.reporters_with_data_in_month = 0 then 'NO_TRADE_DATA'
    when mr.complete_month_flag then 'FULL_COVERAGE'
    else 'PARTIAL_COVERAGE'
  end as trade_reporting_status,
  mr.complete_month_flag,
  mr.latest_complete_month_flag,
  mr.latest_month_flag,
  lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date,
  
    format_date('%Y-%m', cast(lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date as date))
   as latest_complete_year_month,
  case
    when lm.latest_month_start_date is null
      or lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date is null then null
    else cast(
      (
        extract(year from lm.latest_month_start_date) - extract(year from lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date)
      ) * 12
      + (
        extract(month from lm.latest_month_start_date) - extract(month from lcm.latest_complete_month_start_date)
      ) as INT64
    )
  end as months_between_latest_and_latest_complete
from month_rollup as mr
cross join latest_month as lm
cross join latest_complete_month as lcm

model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_m.name: mart_chokepoint_monthly_stress_detail
model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_m.description: Monthly support mart for Page 1 ranked chokepoint detail tables, exposing the existing monthly chokepoint stress signals with simple ranking, hotspot banding, and movement labels at one row per month and chokepoint.

month_start_date.name: month_start_date
month_start_date.description: First calendar day of the month used directly in Looker Studio month filters and table date controls.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.description: Canonical month key in YYYY-MM format for display and sorting support.

month_label.name: month_label
month_label.description: Business-readable month label for tooltips and compact tables.

chokepoint_id.name: chokepoint_id
chokepoint_id.description: Stable canonical chokepoint identifier for filtering and joins.

chokepoint_name.name: chokepoint_name
chokepoint_name.description: Standardized chokepoint display name for executive tables and filters.

z_score_historical.name: z_score_historical
z_score_historical.description: Monthly throughput deviation from the expanding historical baseline, expressed in standard deviations.

abs_z_score_historical.name: abs_z_score_historical
abs_z_score_historical.description: Absolute historical throughput z-score used for hotspot ranking and severity comparisons. This is the raw uncapped analytical field.

z_score_historical_capped.name: z_score_historical_capped
z_score_historical_capped.description: Display-oriented signed historical z-score capped to the range [-3, 3] for executive charts while preserving the raw z_score_historical field for audit use.

stress_deviation_score_capped.name: stress_deviation_score_capped
stress_deviation_score_capped.description: Display-oriented absolute historical z-score capped at 3 for more stable latest-hotspot bar charts.

stress_deviation_index_100.name: stress_deviation_index_100
stress_deviation_index_100.description: Executive-friendly 0 to 100 display index derived from the capped absolute historical z-score, where 100 represents an absolute z-score of 3 or above.

stress_index.name: stress_index
stress_index.description: Monthly blended stress index averaging throughput and vessel-count historical z-scores.

stress_index_weighted.name: stress_index_weighted
stress_index_weighted.description: Monthly blended stress index weighted by the chokepoint-specific priority vessel share.

previous_month_available_flag.name: previous_month_available_flag
previous_month_available_flag.description: True when the immediately prior calendar month exists for the chokepoint and is safe for month-over-month comparison.

previous_month_stress_index.name: previous_month_stress_index
previous_month_stress_index.description: Stress index from the immediately prior calendar month when a valid month-over-month comparison exists.

previous_month_stress_index_weighted.name: previous_month_stress_index_weighted
previous_month_stress_index_weighted.description: Weighted stress index from the immediately prior calendar month when a valid month-over-month comparison exists.

previous_month_z_score_historical.name: previous_month_z_score_historical
previous_month_z_score_historical.description: Historical throughput z-score from the immediately prior calendar month when a valid month-over-month comparison exists.

abs_z_score_historical_mom_change.name: abs_z_score_historical_mom_change
abs_z_score_historical_mom_change.description: Absolute month-over-month change in the magnitude of the historical throughput z-score.

latest_month_flag.name: latest_month_flag
latest_month_flag.description: True when the row belongs to the latest available month in the monthly chokepoint stress source.

event_active_flag.name: event_active_flag
event_active_flag.description: True when one or more active events are linked to the chokepoint in the month.

active_event_count.name: active_event_count
active_event_count.description: Count of distinct active events linked to the chokepoint in the month.

stress_hotspot_band.name: stress_hotspot_band
stress_hotspot_band.description: Existing severity band for the current month based on the absolute historical throughput z-score, retained for backward compatibility.

stress_severity_band.name: stress_severity_band
stress_severity_band.description: Display-oriented severity band for executive tables and conditional formatting, adding an EXTREME tier for absolute historical z-scores of 3 or above.

stress_direction.name: stress_direction
stress_direction.description: Executive movement label showing whether stress severity increased, decreased, or held flat versus the prior calendar month.

stress_rank_in_month.name: stress_rank_in_month
stress_rank_in_month.description: Month-level rank of the chokepoint by absolute historical z-score, using weighted stress as a secondary tie-breaker.

top_5_stressed_chokepoint_flag.name: top_5_stressed_chokepoint_flag
top_5_stressed_chokepoint_flag.description: True when the chokepoint ranks in the top 5 stressed chokepoints for the month among rows with valid historical z-scores.

model.capstone_monthly.mart_chokepoint_m.raw_code:
-- Monthly Looker Studio support mart for Page 1 chokepoint detail.
-- Grain: one row per month_start_date + chokepoint_id.

with base as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    format_date('%b %Y', month_start_date) as month_label,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    z_score_historical,
    stress_index,
    stress_index_weighted,
    previous_month_available_flag,
    previous_month_stress_index,
    previous_month_stress_index_weighted,
    stress_index_mom_change,
    stress_index_weighted_mom_change,
    latest_month_flag,
    event_active_flag,
    active_event_count
  from {{ ref('mart_chokepoint_monthly_stress') }}
),
with_previous_z_score as (
  select
    b.*,
    lag(z_score_historical, 1) over (
      partition by chokepoint_id
      order by month_start_date
    ) as previous_month_z_score_historical_raw
  from base as b
),
prepared as (
  select
    month_start_date,
    year_month,
    month_label,
    chokepoint_id,
    chokepoint_name,
    z_score_historical,
    abs(z_score_historical) as abs_z_score_historical,
    stress_index,
    stress_index_weighted,
    previous_month_available_flag,
    previous_month_stress_index,
    previous_month_stress_index_weighted,
    case
      when previous_month_available_flag then previous_month_z_score_historical_raw
      else null
    end as previous_month_z_score_historical,
    stress_index_mom_change,
    stress_index_weighted_mom_change,
    case
      when previous_month_available_flag
        and previous_month_z_score_historical_raw is not null then abs(z_score_historical) - abs(previous_month_z_score_historical_raw)
      else null
    end as abs_z_score_historical_mom_change,
    latest_month_flag,
    event_active_flag,
    active_event_count,
    case
      when z_score_historical is null then 'INSUFFICIENT_BASELINE'
      when abs(z_score_historical) >= 2 then 'SEVERE'
      when abs(z_score_historical) >= 1 then 'ELEVATED'
      else 'NORMAL'
    end as stress_hotspot_band,
    case
      when z_score_historical is null then null
      when z_score_historical > 3 then 3
      when z_score_historical < -3 then -3
      else z_score_historical
    end as z_score_historical_capped,
    case
      when z_score_historical is null then null
      else least(abs(z_score_historical), 3)
    end as stress_deviation_score_capped,
    case
      when z_score_historical is null then null
      else 100 * least(abs(z_score_historical) / 3, 1)
    end as stress_deviation_index_100,
    case
      when z_score_historical is null then 'INSUFFICIENT_BASELINE'
      when abs(z_score_historical) >= 3 then 'EXTREME'
      when abs(z_score_historical) >= 2 then 'SEVERE'
      when abs(z_score_historical) >= 1 then 'ELEVATED'
      else 'NORMAL'
    end as stress_severity_band,
    case
      when not previous_month_available_flag then 'NO_PRIOR_MONTH'
      when z_score_historical is null or previous_month_z_score_historical_raw is null then 'INSUFFICIENT_BASELINE'
      when abs(z_score_historical) > abs(previous_month_z_score_historical_raw) then 'MORE_STRESSED'
      when abs(z_score_historical) < abs(previous_month_z_score_historical_raw) then 'LESS_STRESSED'
      else 'UNCHANGED'
    end as stress_direction
  from with_previous_z_score
),
ranked as (
  select
    p.*,
    row_number() over (
      partition by month_start_date
      order by
        abs_z_score_historical desc,
        abs(stress_index_weighted) desc,
        chokepoint_name
    ) as raw_stress_rank_in_month
  from prepared as p
)

select
  month_start_date,
  year_month,
  month_label,
  chokepoint_id,
  chokepoint_name,
  z_score_historical,
  abs_z_score_historical,
  z_score_historical_capped,
  stress_deviation_score_capped,
  stress_deviation_index_100,
  stress_index,
  stress_index_weighted,
  previous_month_available_flag,
  previous_month_stress_index,
  previous_month_stress_index_weighted,
  previous_month_z_score_historical,
  stress_index_mom_change,
  stress_index_weighted_mom_change,
  abs_z_score_historical_mom_change,
  latest_month_flag,
  event_active_flag,
  active_event_count,
  stress_hotspot_band,
  stress_severity_band,
  stress_direction,
  case
    when z_score_historical is null then null
    else raw_stress_rank_in_month
  end as stress_rank_in_month,
  case
    when z_score_historical is null then false
    when raw_stress_rank_in_month <= 5 then true
    else false
  end as top_5_stressed_chokepoint_flag
from ranked
